分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const  // 我方消息 + 客户从未回复\\n  else if (ourMsg && c.direction.total <= 1 && silenceDays > 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"我方单向发送+客户无回应超7天→P3\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // /地址|address|delivery.*address|shipping.*address|收货地址|deliver to|ship to|postal code|zip code|country.*city|port of|destination/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"地址已给\\\",\\n  },\\n  quantityConfirmed: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(\\\\d+)\\\\s*(pieces|pcs|units|件|个|套|sets).*(?:确认|confirm|need|want|order|需要|要)/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"数量讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  samples: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /样品|sample|打样|prototype|寄样|send.*sample|sample.*ready|sample.*sent/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"样品阶段\\\",\\n  },\\n  priceDiscussion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /价格|price|quote|报价|quotation|USD|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW|运费|shipping.*cost|freight|每件|per piece|unit price/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"价格/运费讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  productSelection: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /partner|商量|consult|discuss.*partner|合伙|определюсь с партнером|wait.*partner|check.*partner/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"等合伙人商量\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 降级信号关键词\\n// ============================================================\\nconst DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS = {\\n  templateQuestion: {\\n pattern:\\n      /^(hi|hello|hey|dear)\\\\b.{0,30}$/i,\\n    desc: \\\"仅打招呼无实质\\\",\\n  },\\n  onlyEmoji: {\\n    pattern: /^\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*(\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*)*$/,\\n    desc: \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = [\\n  \\\"SD\\\", \\\"EG\\\", \\\"CD\\\", \\\"ZM\\\", \\\"CI\\\", \\\"SA\\\", \\\"AE\\\", // 主市场\\n  \\\"IQ\\\", \\\"OM\\\", \\\"BH\\\", \\\"KW\\\", \\\"QA\\\", \\\"JO\\\", \\\"LY\\\", \\\"LB\\\", // 中东扩展\\n  \\\"GH\\\", \\\"SN\\\", \\\"KE\\\", \\\"TZ\\\", \\\"CM\\\", \\\"ML\\\", \\\"GN\\\", \\\"ZW\\\", // 非洲扩展\\n];\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const downgrades = [];\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(UPGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      upgrades.push({ key, weight: sig.weight, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      downgrades.push({ key, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return { upgrades, evidence.push(`强升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P0`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级 + 核心市场\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7 && isCore) {\\n    priority priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 我方发送 → 需要看是否有客户之前发过消息\\n  else if (c.isUnread && ourMsg && evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P4`);\\n    confidence = 3;\\n  } else if (silenceDays > 30) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P3`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 我方消息 + 客户从未回复\\n  else if (ourMsg && c.direction.total <= 1 && silenceDays > 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"我方单向发送+客户无回应超7天→P3\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // priority,\\n    confidence,\\n    stars,\\n    evidence,\\n    checks,\\n    actions,\\n    tier,\\n    upgradeSignals: signals.upgrades,\\n    downgradeSignals: signals.downgrades,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n// {\\n    pattern: /PI|proforma invoice|形式发票|发票.*已发|PI.*sent|send.*PI/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"PI相关\\\",\\n  },\\n  payment: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /付款|payment|deposit|定金|预付|advance|bank /地址|address|delivery.*address|shipping.*address|收货地址|deliver to|ship to|postal code|zip code|country.*city|port of|destination/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"地址已给\\\",\\n  },\\n  quantityConfirmed: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(\\\\d+)\\\\s*(pieces|pcs|units|件|个|套|sets).*(?:确认|confirm|need|want|order|需要|要)/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"数量讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  samples: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /样品|sample|打样|prototype|寄样|send.*sample|sample.*ready|sample.*sent/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"样品阶段\\\",\\n  },\\n  priceDiscussion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /价格|price|quote|报价|quotation|USD|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW|运费|shipping.*cost|freight|每件|per piece|unit price/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"价格/运费讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  productSelection: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /partner|商量|consult|discuss.*partner|合伙|определюсь с партнером|wait.*partner|check.*partner/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"等合伙人商量\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 降级信号关键词\\n// ============================================================\\nconst DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS = {\\n  templateQuestion: {\\n pattern:\\n      /^(hi|hello|hey|dear)\\\\b.{0,30}$/i,\\n    desc: \\\"仅打招呼无实质\\\",\\n  },\\n  onlyEmoji: {\\n    pattern: /^\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*(\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*)*$/,\\n    desc: \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = [\\n  \\\"SD\\\", \\\"EG\\\", \\\"CD\\\", \\\"ZM\\\", \\\"CI\\\", \\\"SA\\\", \\\"AE\\\", // 主市场\\n  \\\"IQ\\\", \\\"OM\\\", \\\"BH\\\", \\\"KW\\\", \\\"QA\\\", \\\"JO\\\", \\\"LY\\\", \\\"LB\\\", // 中东扩展\\n  \\\"GH\\\", \\\"SN\\\", \\\"KE\\\", \\\"TZ\\\", \\\"CM\\\", \\\"ML\\\", \\\"GN\\\", \\\"ZW\\\", // 非洲扩展\\n];\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const downgrades = [];\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(UPGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      upgrades.push({ key, weight: sig.weight, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      downgrades.push({ key, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return { upgrades, evidence.push(\\\"纯系统消息+近期互动→P3（需确认是否为真人对话）\\\");\\n      confidence = 1;\\n    }\\n    checks.push(\\\"系统消息确认\\\");\\n    return { priority, confidence, evidence, checks, actions, tier: \\\"C\\\" evidence.push(`强升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P0`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级 + 核心市场\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7 && isCore) {\\n    priority priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 我方发送 → 需要看是否有客户之前发过消息\\n  else if (c.isUnread && ourMsg && evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P4`);\\n    confidence = 3;\\n  } else if (silenceDays > 30) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P3`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 我方消息 + 客户从未回复\\n  else if (ourMsg && c.direction.total <= 1 && silenceDays > 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"我方单向发送+客户无回应超7天→P3\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 默认：保持规则分类 + 降低置信度\\n  else {\\n    evidence.push(\\\"信号不足，维持规则分类\\\");\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n\\n  // ---- 修正不合理分类 ----\\n  // 如果规则分了P0但最新消息只是我方模板提问 → 降级\\n  if (c._rulePriority === \\\"P0\\\" priority,\\n    confidence,\\n    stars,\\n    evidence,\\n    checks,\\n    actions,\\n    tier,\\n    upgradeSignals: signals.upgrades,\\n    downgradeSignals: signals.downgrades,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n// message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
## 1. Primary Request and Intent:
The user requested "继续 OKKI CRM 客户分析，跑阶段2" (Continue OKKI CRM customer analysis, run Phase 2). Phase 2 is defined as AI classification + evidence summary + confidence scoring for 432 OKKI CRM customers. The two-pass methodology requires: (1) metadata-based rough screening, (2) content-based correction by reading actual conversation messages. Output must include full P0-P4 ranking, evidence chains, two-pass diff report, ★☆☆ highlight list, and self-check checklist. After completion, pause for user review before proceeding to Phase 3.

## 2. Key Technical Concepts:
- **5-Tier Priority Model**: P0 (payment/after-sales/high-intent), P1 (active negotiation/samples/quotes), P2 (valid inquiry/30-day interaction), P3 (silent/template response), P4 (30+ days no interaction/system-only)
- **Two-Pass Classification**: First pass metadata (unreadCount, lastContactTime, message direction, silence days), second pass content signals (upgrade/downgrade triggers in latestMessageContent)
- **Upgrade Triggers** (9 categories with weights): order signals (2), PI-related (2), payment-related (2), address given (1), quantity confirmed (1), samples stage (1), price/shipping discussion (1), product selection (1), partner consultation (1)
- **Downgrade Triggers** (3 categories): template questions, generic greetings only, emoji-only messages
- **Confidence Stars**: ★★★ (confirmed, no review needed), ★★☆ (high probability, quick scan), ★☆☆ (uncertain, must confirm)
- **CDP Data Limitation**: All data files lack full conversation messages — only latestMessageContent snapshots available, not complete message history
- **Core Markets**: SD, EG, CD, ZM, CI, SA, AE + Middle East expansion (IQ, OM, BH, KW, QA, JO, LY, LB) + Africa expansion (GH, SN, KE, TZ, CM, ML, GN, ZW)

## 3. Files and Code Sections:

- **`08_客户跟进/Okki/scripts/classify_ai.js`** (Created, Phase 2 implementation script)

skills.name: claude-mem:do
skills.content:
Base directory for this skill: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\plugins\cache\thedotmack\claude-mem\12.5.1\skills\do

# Do Plan

You are an ORCHESTRATOR. Deploy subagents to execute *all* work. Do not do the work yourself except to coordinate, route context, and verify that each subagent completed its assigned checklist.

## Execution Protocol

### Rules

- Each phase uses fresh subagents where noted (or when context is large/unclear)
- Assign one clear objective per subagent and require evidence (commands run, outputs, files changed)
- Do not advance to the next step until the assigned subagent reports completion and the orchestrator confirms it matches the plan

### During Each Phase

Deploy an "Implementation" subagent to:
1. Execute the implementation as specified
2. COPY patterns from documentation, don't invent
3. Cite documentation sources in code comments when using unfamiliar APIs
4. If an API seems missing, STOP and verify — don't assume it exists

### After Each Phase

Deploy subagents for each post-phase responsibility:
1. **Run verification checklist** — Deploy a "Verification" subagent to prove the phase worked
2. **Anti-pattern check** — Deploy an "Anti-pattern" subagent to grep for known bad patterns from the plan
3. **Code quality review** — Deploy a "Code Quality" subagent to review changes
4. **Commit only if verified** — Deploy a "Commit" subagent *only after* verification passes; otherwise, do not commit

### Between Phases

Deploy a "Branch/Sync" subagent to:
- Push to working branch after each verified phase
- Prepare the next phase handoff so the next phase's subagents start fresh but have plan context

## Failure Modes to Prevent

- Don't invent APIs that "should" exist — verify against docs
- Don't add undocumented parameters — copy exact signatures
- Don't skip verification — deploy a verification subagent and run the checklist
- Don't commit before verification passes (or without explicit orchestrator approval)

skills.name: claude-mem:smart-explore
skills.content:
Base directory for this skill: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\plugins\cache\thedotmack\claude-mem\12.5.1\skills\smart-explore

# Smart Explore

Structural code exploration using AST parsing. **This skill overrides your default exploration behavior.** While this skill is active, use smart_search/smart_outline/smart_unfold as your primary tools instead of Read, Grep, and Glob.

**Core principle:** Index first, fetch on demand. Give yourself a map of the code before loading implementation details. The question before every file read should be: "do I need to see all of this, or can I get a structural overview first?" The answer is almost always: get the map.

## Your Next Tool Call

This skill only loads instructions. You must call the MCP tools yourself. Your next action should be one of:

```
smart_search(query="<topic>", path="./src")    -- discover files + symbols across a directory
smart_outline(file_path="<file>")              -- structural skeleton of one file
smart_unfold(file_path="<file>", symbol_name="<name>")  -- full source of one symbol
```

Do NOT run Grep, Glob, Read, or find to discover files first. `smart_search` walks directories, parses all code files, and returns ranked symbols in one call. It replaces the Glob → Grep → Read discovery cycle.

## 3-Layer Workflow

### Step 1: Search -- Discover Files and Symbols

```
smart_search(query="shutdown", path="./src", max_results=15)
```

**Returns:** Ranked symbols with signatures, line numbers, match reasons, plus folded file views (~2-6k tokens)

```
-- Matching Symbols --
  function performGracefulShutdown (services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts:56)
  function httpShutdown (services/infrastructure/HealthMonitor.ts:92)
  method WorkerService.shutdown (services/worker-service.ts:846)

-- Folded File Views --
  services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts (7 symbols)
  services/worker-service.ts (12 symbols)
```

This is your discovery tool. It finds relevant files AND shows their structure. No Glob/find pre-scan needed.

**Parameters:**

- `query` (string, required) -- What to search for (function name, concept, class name)
- `path` (string) -- Root directory to search (defaults to cwd)
- `max_results` (number) -- Max matching symbols, default 20, max 50
- `file_pattern` (string, optional) -- Filter to specific files/paths

### Step 2: Outline -- Get File Structure

```
smart_outline(file_path="services/worker-service.ts")
```

**Returns:** Complete structural skeleton -- all functions, classes, methods, properties, imports (~1-2k tokens per file)

**Skip this step** when Step 1's folded file views already provide enough structure. Most useful for files not covered by the search results.

**Parameters:**

- `file_path` (string, required) -- Path to the file

### Step 3: Unfold -- See Implementation

Review symbols from Steps 1-2. Pick the ones you need. Unfold only those:

```
smart_unfold(file_path="services/worker-service.ts", symbol_name="shutdown")
```

**Returns:** Full source code of the specified symbol including JSDoc, decorators, and complete implementation (~400-2,100 tokens depending on symbol size). AST node boundaries guarantee completeness regardless of symbol size — unlike Read + agent summarization, which may truncate long methods.

**Parameters:**

- `file_path` (string, required) -- Path to the file (as returned by search/outline)
- `symbol_name` (string, required) -- Name of the function/class/method to expand

## When to Use Standard Tools Instead

Use these only when smart_* tools are the wrong fit:

- **Grep:** Exact string/regex search ("find all TODO comments", "where is `ensureWorkerStarted` defined?")
- **Read:** Small files under ~100 lines, non-code files (JSON, markdown, config)
- **Glob:** File path patterns ("find all test files")
- **Explore agent:** When you need synthesized understanding across 6+ files, architecture narratives, or answers to open-ended questions like "how does this entire system work end-to-end?" Smart-explore is a scalpel — it answers "where is this?" and "show me that." It doesn't synthesize cross-file data flows, design decisions, or edge cases across an entire feature.

For code files over ~100 lines, prefer smart_outline + smart_unfold over Read.

## Workflow Examples

**Discover how a feature works (cross-cutting):**

```
1. smart_search(query="shutdown", path="./src")
   -> 14 symbols across 7 files, full picture in one call
2. smart_unfold(file_path="services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts", symbol_name="performGracefulShutdown")
   -> See the core implementation
```

**Navigate a large file:**

```
1. smart_outline(file_path="services/worker-service.ts")
   -> 1,466 tokens: 12 functions, WorkerService class with 24 members
2. smart_unfold(file_path="services/worker-service.ts", symbol_name="startSessionProcessor")
   -> 1,610 tokens: the specific method you need
Total: ~3,076 tokens vs ~12,000 to Read the full file
```

**Write documentation about code (hybrid workflow):**

```
1. smart_search(query="feature name", path="./src")    -- discover all relevant files and symbols
2. smart_outline on key files                           -- understand structure
3. smart_unfold on important functions                  -- get implementation details
4. Read on small config/markdown/plan files             -- get non-code context
```

Use smart_* tools for code exploration, Read for non-code files. Mix freely.

**Exploration then precision:**

```
1. smart_search(query="session", path="./src", max_results=10)
   -> 10 ranked symbols: SessionMetadata, SessionQueueProcessor, SessionSummary...
2. Pick the relevant one, unfold it
```

## Token Economics

| Approach | Tokens | Use Case |
|----------|--------|----------|
| smart_outline | ~1,000-2,000 | "What's in this file?" |
| smart_unfold | ~400-2,100 | "Show me this function" |
| smart_search | ~2,000-6,000 | "Find all X across the codebase" |
| search + unfold | ~3,000-8,000 | End-to-end: find and read (the primary workflow) |
| Read (full file) | ~12,000+ | When you truly need everything |
| Explore agent | ~39,000-59,000 | Cross-file synthesis with narrative |

**4-8x savings** on file understanding (outline + unfold vs Read). **11-18x savings** on codebase exploration vs Explore agent. The narrower the query, the wider the gap — a 27-line function costs 55x less to read via unfold than via an Explore agent, because the agent still reads the entire file.

## Language Support

Smart-explore uses **tree-sitter AST parsing** for structural analysis. Unsupported file types fall back to text-based search.

### Bundled Languages

| Language | Extensions |
|----------|-----------|
| JavaScript | `.js`, `.mjs`, `.cjs` |
| TypeScript | `.ts` |
| TSX / JSX | `.tsx`, `.jsx` |
| Python | `.py`, `.pyw` |
| Go | `.go` |
| Rust | `.rs` |
| Ruby | `.rb` |
| Java | `.java` |
| C | `.c`, `.h` |
| C++ | `.cpp`, `.cc`, `.cxx`, `.hpp`, `.hh` |

Files with unrecognized extensions are parsed as plain text — `smart_search` still works (grep-style), but `smart_outline` and `smart_unfold` will not extract structured symbols.

### Custom Grammars (`.claude-mem.json`)

You can register additional tree-sitter grammars for file types not in the bundled list. Create or update `.claude-mem.json` in your project root:

```json
{
  "grammars": {
    ".sol": "tree-sitter-solidity",
    ".graphql": "tree-sitter-graphql"
  }
}
```

Each key is a file extension; each value is the npm package name of the tree-sitter grammar. The grammar must be installed locally (`npm install tree-sitter-solidity`). Once registered, `smart_outline` and `smart_unfold` will parse those extensions structurally instead of falling back to plain text.

### Markdown Special Support

Markdown files (`.md`, `.mdx`) receive special handling beyond the generic plain-text fallback:

- **`smart_outline`** — extracts headings (`#`, `##`, `###`) as the symbol tree. Use it to navigate long documents without reading the full file.
- **`smart_search`** — searches within code fences as well as prose, so queries for function names inside ` ```ts ``` ` blocks work as expected.
- **`smart_unfold`** — expands heading sections rather than function bodies; each section up to the next same-level heading is returned as a chunk.
- **Frontmatter** — YAML frontmatter (lines between leading `---` delimiters) is included in `smart_outline` output under a synthetic `frontmatter` symbol so metadata like `title:` and `description:` is visible without reading the whole file.

Also read data/classified_rules_2026-05-04T07-48-48.json (first 200 lines) to understand the input data structure.

```
smart_unfold(file_path="<file>", symbol_name="<name>")  -- full source of one symbol
```

Do NOT run Grep, Glob, Read, or find to discover files first. `smart_search` walks directories, parses all code files, and returns ranked symbols in one call. It replaces the Glob → Grep → Read discovery cycle.

## 3-Layer Workflow

### Step 1: Search -- Discover Files and Symbols

```
smart_search(query="shutdown", path="./src", max_results=15)
```

**Returns:** Ranked symbols with signatures, line numbers, match reasons, plus folded file views (~2-6k tokens)

```
-- Matching Symbols --
  function performGracefulShutdown (services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts:56)
  function httpShutdown (services/infrastructure/HealthMonitor.ts:92)
  method WorkerService.shutdown (services/worker-service.ts:846)

-- Folded File Views --
  services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts (7 symbols)
  services/worker-service.ts (12 symbols)
```

This is your discovery tool. It finds relevant files AND shows their structure. No Glob/find pre-scan needed.

**Parameters:**

- `query` (string, required) -- What to search for (function name, concept, class name)
- `path` (string) -- Root directory to search (defaults to cwd)
- `max_results` (number) -- Max matching symbols, default 20, max 50
- `file_pattern` (string, optional) -- Filter to specific files/paths

### Step 2: Outline -- Get File Structure

```
smart_outline(file_path="services/worker-service.ts")
```

**Returns:** Complete structural skeleton -- all functions, classes, methods, properties, imports (~1-2k tokens per file)

**Skip this step** when Step 1's folded file views already provide enough structure. Most useful for files not covered by the search results.

**Parameters:**

- `file_path` (string, required) -- Path to the file

### Step 3: Unfold -- See Implementation

Review symbols from Steps 1-2. Pick the ones you need. Unfold only those:

```
smart_unfold(file_path="services/worker-service.ts", symbol_name="shutdown")
```

**Returns:** Full source code of the specified symbol including JSDoc, decorators, and complete implementation (~400-2,100 tokens depending on symbol size). AST node boundaries guarantee completeness regardless of symbol size — unlike Read + agent summarization, which may truncate long methods.

**Parameters:**

- `file_path` (string, required) -- Path to the file (as returned by search/outline)
- `symbol_name` (string, required) -- Name of the function/class/method to expand

## When to Use Standard Tools Instead

Use these only when smart_* tools are the wrong fit:

- **Grep:** Exact string/regex search ("find all TODO comments", "where is `ensureWorkerStarted` defined?")
- **Read:** Small files under ~100 lines, non-code files (JSON, markdown, config)
- **Glob:** File path patterns ("find all test files")
- **Explore agent:** When you need synthesized understanding across 6+ files, architecture narratives, or answers to open-ended questions like "how does this entire system work end-to-end?" Smart-explore is a scalpel — it answers "where is this?" and "show me that." It doesn't synthesize cross-file data flows, design decisions, or edge cases across an entire feature.

For code files over ~100 lines, prefer smart_outline + smart_unfold over Read.

## Workflow Examples

**Discover how a feature works (cross-cutting):**

```
1. smart_search(query="shutdown", path="./src")
   -> 14 symbols across 7 files, full picture in one call
2. smart_unfold(file_path="services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts", symbol_name="performGracefulShutdown")
   -> See the core implementation
```

**Navigate a large file:**

```
1. smart_outline(file_path="services/worker-service.ts")
   -> 1,466 tokens: 12 functions, WorkerService class with 24 members
2. smart_unfold(file_path="services/worker-service.ts", symbol_name="startSessionProcessor")
   -> 1,610 tokens: the specific method you need
Total: ~3,076 tokens vs ~12,000 to Read the full file
```

**Write documentation about code (hybrid workflow):**

```
1. smart_search(query="feature name", path="./src")    -- discover all relevant files and symbols
2. smart_outline on key files                           -- understand structure
3. smart_unfold on important functions                  -- get implementation details
4. Read on small config/markdown/plan files             -- get non-code context
```

Use smart_* tools for code exploration, Read for non-code files. Mix freely.

**Exploration then precision:**

```
1. smart_search(query="session", path="./src", max_results=10)
   -> 10 ranked symbols: SessionMetadata, SessionQueueProcessor, SessionSummary...
2. Pick the relevant one, unfold it
```

## Token Economics

| Approach | Tokens | Use Case |
|----------|--------|----------|
| smart_outline | ~1,000-2,000 | "What's in this file?" |
| smart_unfold | ~400-2,100 | "Show me this function" |
| smart_search | ~2,000-6,000 | "Find all X across the codebase" |
| search + unfold | ~3,000-8,000 | End-to-end: find and read (the primary workflow) |
| Read (full file) | ~12,000+ | When you truly need everything |
| Explore agent | ~39,000-59,000 | Cross-file synthesis with narrative |

**4-8x savings** on file understanding (outline + unfold vs Read). **11-18x savings** on codebase exploration vs Explore agent. The narrower the query, the wider the gap — a 27-line function costs 55x less to read via unfold than via an Explore agent, because the agent still reads the entire file.

## Language Support

Smart-explore uses **tree-sitter AST parsing** for structural analysis. Unsupported file types fall back to text-based search.

### Bundled Languages

| Language | Extensions |
|----------|-----------|
| JavaScript | `.js`, `.mjs`, `.cjs` |
| TypeScript | `.ts` |
| TSX / JSX | `.tsx`, `.jsx` |
| Python | `.py`, `.pyw` |
| Go | `.go` |
| Rust | `.rs` |
| Ruby | `.rb` |
| Java | `.java` |
| C | `.c`, `.h` |
| C++ | `.cpp`, `.cc`, `.cxx`, `.hpp`, `.hh` |

Files with unrecognized extensions are parsed as plain text — `smart_search` still works (grep-style), but `smart_outline` and `smart_unfold` will not extract structured symbols.

### Custom Grammars (`.claude-mem.json`)

You can register additional tree-sitter grammars for file types not in the bundled list. Create or update `.claude-mem.json` in your project root:

```json
{
  "grammars": {
    ".sol": "tree-sitter-solidity",
    ".graphql": "tree-sitter-graphql"
  }
}
```

Each key is a file extension; each value is the npm package name of the tree-sitter grammar. The grammar must be installed locally (`npm install tree-sitter-solidity`). Once registered, `smart_outline` and `smart_unfold` will parse those extensions structurally instead of falling back to plain text.

### Markdown Special Support

Markdown files (`.md`, `.mdx`) receive special handling beyond the generic plain-text fallback:

- **`smart_outline`** — extracts headings (`#`, `##`, `###`) as the symbol tree. Use it to navigate long documents without reading the full file.
- **`smart_search`** — searches within code fences as well as prose, so queries for function names inside ` ```ts ``` ` blocks work as expected.
- **`smart_unfold`** — expands heading sections rather than function bodies; each section up to the next same-level heading is returned as a chunk.
- **Frontmatter** — YAML frontmatter (lines between leading `---` delimiters) is included in `smart_outline` output under a synthetic `frontmatter` symbol so metadata like `title:` and `description:` is visible without reading the whole file.

quantityConfirmed: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(\\\\d+)\\\\s*(pieces|pcs|units|件|个|套|sets).*(?:确认|confirm|need|want|order|需要|要)/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"数量讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  samples: {\\n /价格|price|quote|报价|quotation|USD|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW|运费|shipping.*cost|freight|每件|per piece|unit price/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"价格/运费讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  productSelection: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const  // 我方消息 + 客户从未回复\\n  else if (ourMsg && c.direction.total <= 1 && silenceDays > 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"我方单向发送+客户无回应超7天→P3\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // content.text:
Base directory for this skill: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\plugins\cache\thedotmack\claude-mem\12.5.1\skills\smart-explore

# Smart Explore

Structural code exploration using AST parsing. **This skill overrides your default exploration behavior.** While this skill is active, use smart_search/smart_outline/smart_unfold as your primary tools instead of Read, Grep, and Glob.

**Core principle:** Index first, fetch on demand. Give yourself a map of the code before loading implementation details. The question before every file read should be: "do I need to see all of this, or can I get a structural overview first?" The answer is almost always: get the map.

## Your Next Tool Call

This skill only loads instructions. You must call the MCP tools yourself. Your next action should be one of:

```
smart_search(query="<topic>", path="./src")    -- discover files + symbols across a directory
smart_outline(file_path="<file>")              -- structural skeleton of one file
smart_unfold(file_path="<file>", symbol_name="<name>")  -- full source of one symbol
```

Do NOT run Grep, Glob, Read, or find to discover files first. `smart_search` walks directories, parses all code files, and returns ranked symbols in one call. It replaces the Glob → Grep → Read discovery cycle.

## 3-Layer Workflow

### Step 1: Search -- Discover Files and Symbols

```
smart_search(query="shutdown", path="./src", max_results=15)
```

**Returns:** Ranked symbols with signatures, line numbers, match reasons, plus folded file views (~2-6k tokens)

```
-- Matching Symbols --
  function performGracefulShutdown (services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts:56)
  function httpShutdown (services/infrastructure/HealthMonitor.ts:92)
  method WorkerService.shutdown (services/worker-service.ts:846)

-- Folded File Views --
  services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts (7 symbols)
  services/worker-service.ts (12 symbols)
```

This is your discovery tool. It finds relevant files AND shows their structure. No Glob/find pre-scan needed.

**Parameters:**

- `query` (string, required) -- What to search for (function name, concept, class name)
- `path` (string) -- Root directory to search (defaults to cwd)
- `max_results` (number) -- Max matching symbols, default 20, max 50
- `file_pattern` (string, optional) -- Filter to specific files/paths

### Step 2: Outline -- Get File Structure

```
smart_outline(file_path="services/worker-service.ts")
```

**Returns:** Complete structural skeleton -- all functions, classes, methods, properties, imports (~1-2k tokens per file)

**Skip this step** when Step 1's folded file views already provide enough structure. Most useful for files not covered by the search results.

**Parameters:**

- `file_path` (string, required) -- Path to the file

### Step 3: Unfold -- See Implementation

Review symbols from Steps 1-2. Pick the ones you need. Unfold only those:

```
smart_unfold(file_path="services/worker-service.ts", symbol_name="shutdown")
```

**Returns:** Full source code of the specified symbol including JSDoc, decorators, and complete implementation (~400-2,100 tokens depending on symbol size). AST node boundaries guarantee completeness regardless of symbol size — unlike Read + agent summarization, which may truncate long methods.

**Parameters:**

- `file_path` (string, required) -- Path to the file (as returned by search/outline)
- `symbol_name` (string, required) -- Name of the function/class/method to expand

## When to Use Standard Tools Instead

Use these only when smart_* tools are the wrong fit:

- **Grep:** Exact string/regex search ("find all TODO comments", "where is `ensureWorkerStarted` defined?")
- **Read:** Small files under ~100 lines, non-code files (JSON, markdown, config)
- **Glob:** File path patterns ("find all test files")
- **Explore agent:** When you need synthesized understanding across 6+ files, architecture narratives, or answers to open-ended questions like "how does this entire system work end-to-end?" Smart-explore is a scalpel — it answers "where is this?" and "show me that." It doesn't synthesize cross-file data flows, design decisions, or edge cases across an entire feature.

For code files over ~100 lines, prefer smart_outline + smart_unfold over Read.

## Workflow Examples

**Discover how a feature works (cross-cutting):**

```
1. smart_search(query="shutdown", path="./src")
   -> 14 symbols across 7 files, full picture in one call
2. smart_unfold(file_path="services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts", symbol_name="performGracefulShutdown")
   -> See the core implementation
```

**Navigate a large file:**

```
1. smart_outline(file_path="services/worker-service.ts")
   -> 1,466 tokens: 12 functions, WorkerService class with 24 members
2. smart_unfold(file_path="services/worker-service.ts", symbol_name="startSessionProcessor")
   -> 1,610 tokens: the specific method you need
Total: ~3,076 tokens vs ~12,000 to Read the full file
```

**Write documentation about code (hybrid workflow):**

```
1. smart_search(query="feature name", path="./src")    -- discover all relevant files and symbols
2. smart_outline on key files                           -- understand structure
3. smart_unfold on important functions                  -- get implementation details
4. Read on small config/markdown/plan files             -- get non-code context
```

Use smart_* tools for code exploration, Read for non-code files. Mix freely.

**Exploration then precision:**

```
1. smart_search(query="session", path="./src", max_results=10)
   -> 10 ranked symbols: SessionMetadata, SessionQueueProcessor, SessionSummary...
2. Pick the relevant one, unfold it
```

## Token Economics

| Approach | Tokens | Use Case |
|----------|--------|----------|
| smart_outline | ~1,000-2,000 | "What's in this file?" |
| smart_unfold | ~400-2,100 | "Show me this function" |
| smart_search | ~2,000-6,000 | "Find all X across the codebase" |
| search + unfold | ~3,000-8,000 | End-to-end: find and read (the primary workflow) |
| Read (full file) | ~12,000+ | When you truly need everything |
| Explore agent | ~39,000-59,000 | Cross-file synthesis with narrative |

**4-8x savings** on file understanding (outline + unfold vs Read). **11-18x savings** on codebase exploration vs Explore agent. The narrower the query, the wider the gap — a 27-line function costs 55x less to read via unfold than via an Explore agent, because the agent still reads the entire file.

## Language Support

Smart-explore uses **tree-sitter AST parsing** for structural analysis. Unsupported file types fall back to text-based search.

### Bundled Languages

| Language | Extensions |
|----------|-----------|
| JavaScript | `.js`, `.mjs`, `.cjs` |
| TypeScript | `.ts` |
| TSX / JSX | `.tsx`, `.jsx` |
| Python | `.py`, `.pyw` |
| Go | `.go` |
| Rust | `.rs` |
| Ruby | `.rb` |
| Java | `.java` |
| C | `.c`, `.h` |
| C++ | `.cpp`, `.cc`, `.cxx`, `.hpp`, `.hh` |

Files with unrecognized extensions are parsed as plain text — `smart_search` still works (grep-style), but `smart_outline` and `smart_unfold` will not extract structured symbols.

### Custom Grammars (`.claude-mem.json`)

You can register additional tree-sitter grammars for file types not in the bundled list. Create or update `.claude-mem.json` in your project root:

```json
{
  "grammars": {
    ".sol": "tree-sitter-solidity",
    ".graphql": "tree-sitter-graphql"
  }
}
```

Each key is a file extension; each value is the npm package name of the tree-sitter grammar. The grammar must be installed locally (`npm install tree-sitter-solidity`). Once registered, `smart_outline` and `smart_unfold` will parse those extensions structurally instead of falling back to plain text.

### Markdown Special Support

Markdown files (`.md`, `.mdx`) receive special handling beyond the generic plain-text fallback:

- **`smart_outline`** — extracts headings (`#`, `##`, `###`) as the symbol tree. Use it to navigate long documents without reading the full file.
- **`smart_search`** — searches within code fences as well as prose, so queries for function names inside ` ```ts ``` ` blocks work as expected.
- **`smart_unfold`** — expands heading sections rather than function bodies; each section up to the next same-level heading is returned as a chunk.
- **Frontmatter** — YAML frontmatter (lines between leading `---` delimiters) is included in `smart_outline` output under a synthetic `frontmatter` symbol so metadata like `title:` and `description:` is visible without reading the whole file.

{\\n    pattern: /PI|proforma invoice|形式发票|发票.*已发|PI.*sent|send.*PI/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"PI相关\\\",\\n  },\\n  payment: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /付款|payment|deposit|定金|预付|advance|bank /地址|address|delivery.*address|shipping.*address|收货地址|deliver to|ship to|postal code|zip code|country.*city|port of|destination/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"地址已给\\\",\\n  },\\n  quantityConfirmed: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(\\\\d+)\\\\s*(pieces|pcs|units|件|个|套|sets).*(?:确认|confirm|need|want|order|需要|要)/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"数量讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  samples: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /样品|sample|打样|prototype|寄样|send.*sample|sample.*ready|sample.*sent/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"样品阶段\\\",\\n  },\\n  priceDiscussion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /价格|price|quote|报价|quotation|USD|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW|运费|shipping.*cost|freight|每件|per piece|unit price/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"价格/运费讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  productSelection: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /partner|商量|consult|discuss.*partner|合伙|определюсь с партнером|wait.*partner|check.*partner/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"等合伙人商量\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 降级信号关键词\\n// ============================================================\\nconst DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS = {\\n  templateQuestion: {\\n pattern:\\n      /^(hi|hello|hey|dear)\\\\b.{0,30}$/i,\\n    desc: \\\"仅打招呼无实质\\\",\\n  },\\n  onlyEmoji: {\\n    pattern: /^\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*(\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*)*$/,\\n    desc: \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = [\\n  \\\"SD\\\", \\\"EG\\\", \\\"CD\\\", \\\"ZM\\\", \\\"CI\\\", \\\"SA\\\", \\\"AE\\\", // 主市场\\n  \\\"IQ\\\", \\\"OM\\\", \\\"BH\\\", \\\"KW\\\", \\\"QA\\\", \\\"JO\\\", \\\"LY\\\", \\\"LB\\\", // 中东扩展\\n  \\\"GH\\\", \\\"SN\\\", \\\"KE\\\", \\\"TZ\\\", \\\"CM\\\", \\\"ML\\\", \\\"GN\\\", \\\"ZW\\\", // 非洲扩展\\n];\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const downgrades = [];\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(UPGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      upgrades.push({ key, weight: sig.weight, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      downgrades.push({ key, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return { upgrades, evidence.push(\\\"纯系统消息+近期互动→P3（需确认是否为真人对话）\\\");\\n      confidence = 1;\\n    }\\n    checks.push(\\\"系统消息确认\\\");\\n    return { priority, confidence, evidence, checks, actions, tier: \\\"C\\\" };\\n  }\\n\\n  // hasAddress + 我方追问地址/运费 → 谈判活跃\\n  if (c.flags.hasAddress && totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 5) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n evidence.push(`强升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P0`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级 + 核心市场\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7 && isCore) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+核心市场+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 我方发送 → 需要看是否有客户之前发过消息\\n  else if (c.isUnread && ourMsg && (c.flags.needLookback) {\\n    priority = \\\"P2\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"最后消息为表情/单字+无法判断真实阶段→暂P2\\\");\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n  // 我方模板提问 + 客户沉默>3天 → 降级\\n  else if (hasDowngrade && ourMsg && silenceDays > 3) {\\n    if (silenceDays > 14) {\\n      priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"模板提问+客户沉默超14天→P3\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    } else {\\n      priority = \\\"P2\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"模板提问+客户沉默${silenceDays}天→P2\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    }\\n  }\\n  // 长期沉默\\n  else if (silenceDays > 60) {\\n    priority = \\\"P4\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P4`);\\n    confidence = 3;\\n  } else if (silenceDays > 30) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P3`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 我方消息 + 客户从未回复\\n  else if (ourMsg && c.direction.total <= 1 && silenceDays > 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"我方单向发送+客户无回应超7天→P3\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 默认：保持规则分类 + 降低置信度\\n  else {\\n    evidence.push(\\\"信号不足，维持规则分类\\\");\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n\\n  // ---- 修正不合理分类 ----\\n  // 如果规则分了P0但最新消息只是我方模板提问 → 降级\\n  if (c._rulePriority === \\\"P0\\\" {\\n    pattern: /PI|proforma invoice|形式发票|发票.*已发|PI.*sent|send.*PI/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"PI相关\\\",\\n  },\\n  payment: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /付款|payment|deposit|定金|预付|advance|bank /地址|address|delivery.*address|shipping.*address|收货地址|deliver to|ship to|postal code|zip code|country.*city|port of|destination/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"地址已给\\\",\\n  },\\n  quantityConfirmed: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(\\\\d+)\\\\s*(pieces|pcs|units|件|个|套|sets).*(?:确认|confirm|need|want|order|需要|要)/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"数量讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  samples: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /样品|sample|打样|prototype|寄样|send.*sample|sample.*ready|sample.*sent/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"样品阶段\\\",\\n  },\\n  priceDiscussion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /价格|price|quote|报价|quotation|USD|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW|运费|shipping.*cost|freight|每件|per piece|unit price/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"价格/运费讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  productSelection: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /partner|商量|consult|discuss.*partner|合伙|определюсь с партнером|wait.*partner|check.*partner/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"等合伙人商量\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 降级信号关键词\\n// ============================================================\\nconst DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS = {\\n  templateQuestion: {\\n pattern:\\n      /^(hi|hello|hey|dear)\\\\b.{0,30}$/i,\\n    desc: \\\"仅打招呼无实质\\\",\\n  },\\n  onlyEmoji: {\\n    pattern: /^\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*(\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*)*$/,\\n    desc: \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = [\\n  \\\"SD\\\", \\\"EG\\\", \\\"CD\\\", \\\"ZM\\\", \\\"CI\\\", \\\"SA\\\", \\\"AE\\\", // 主市场\\n  \\\"IQ\\\", \\\"OM\\\", \\\"BH\\\", \\\"KW\\\", \\\"QA\\\", \\\"JO\\\", \\\"LY\\\", \\\"LB\\\", // 中东扩展\\n  \\\"GH\\\", \\\"SN\\\", \\\"KE\\\", \\\"TZ\\\", \\\"CM\\\", \\\"ML\\\", \\\"GN\\\", \\\"ZW\\\", // 非洲扩展\\n];\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const downgrades = [];\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(UPGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      upgrades.push({ key, weight: sig.weight, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      downgrades.push({ key, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return { upgrades, evidence.push(\\\"纯系统消息+近期互动→P3（需确认是否为真人对话）\\\");\\n      confidence = 1;\\n    }\\n    checks.push(\\\"系统消息确认\\\");\\n    return { priority, confidence, evidence, checks, actions, tier: \\\"C\\\" };\\n  }\\n\\n  // hasAddress + 我方追问地址/运费 → 谈判活跃\\n  if (c.flags.hasAddress && totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 5) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n evidence.push(`强升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P0`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级 + 核心市场\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7 && isCore) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+核心市场+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 我方发送 → 需要看是否有客户之前发过消息\\n  else if (c.isUnread && ourMsg && silenceDays <= 3) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`未读消息+我方最近发送+${silenceDays}天→P1（需确认客户是否有回应）`);\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 客户发送 → 可能重要\\n  else if (c.isUnread && custMsg) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"未读消息+客户发送→P0（客户主动联系，高优先）\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 有地址标记 + 近期活跃\\n  else if (c.flags.hasAddress && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`有地址+${silenceDays}天内活跃→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 核心市场 + 近期活跃 + 有实质内容\\n  else if (isCore && silenceDays <= 7 && c.latestMsg && c.latestMsg.length > 30) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`核心市场+${silenceDays}天内活跃+有实质内容→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // needLookback → 最后一条是表情/单字，数据不够\\n  else if (c.flags.needLookback) {\\n    priority = \\\"P2\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"最后消息为表情/单字+无法判断真实阶段→暂P2\\\");\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n  // 我方模板提问 + 客户沉默>3天 → 降级\\n  else if (hasDowngrade && ourMsg && silenceDays > 3) {\\n    if (silenceDays > 14) {\\n      priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"模板提问+客户沉默超14天→P3\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    } else {\\n      priority = \\\"P2\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"模板提问+客户沉默${silenceDays}天→P2\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    }\\n  }\\n  // 长期沉默\\n  else if (silenceDays > 60) {\\n    priority = \\\"P4\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P4`);\\n    confidence = 3;\\n  } else if (silenceDays > 30) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P3`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const }\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      downgrades.push({ key, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return { upgrades, evidence.push(\\\"纯系统消息+近期互动→P3（需确认是否为真人对话）\\\");\\n      confidence = 1;\\n    }\\n    checks.push(\\\"系统消息确认\\\");\\n    return { priority, confidence, evidence, checks, actions, tier: \\\"C\\\" evidence.push(`强升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P0`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级 + 核心市场\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7 && isCore) {\\n    priority priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 我方发送 → 需要看是否有客户之前发过消息\\n  else if (c.isUnread && ourMsg && evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P4`);\\n    confidence = 3;\\n  } else if (silenceDays > 30) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P3`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 我方消息 + 客户从未回复\\n  else if (ourMsg && c.direction.total <= 1 && silenceDays > 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"我方单向发送+客户无回应超7天→P3\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // && hasDowngrade && ourMsg) {\\n    if (silenceDays <= 3) {\\n      priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"规则P0但实为我方模板提问→降为P1\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    } else {\\n      priority = checks.push(`降级信号:${signals.downgrades.map((d) => d.desc).join(\\\"+\\\") || \\\"无\\\"}`);\\n\\n  // 置信度标记\\n  const stars = confidence === 3 ? \\\"★★★\\\" : confidence === 2 ? \\\"★★☆\\\" : priority,\\n    confidence,\\n    stars,\\n    evidence,\\n    checks,\\n    actions,\\n    tier,\\n    upgradeSignals: signals.upgrades,\\n    downgradeSignals: signals.downgrades,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n// \\\"classified_rules_2026-05-04T07-48-48.json\\\");\\nconst outputFile = path.join(\\n  DATA_DIR,\\n  `classified_ai_${new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, \\\"-\\\")}.json`\\n);\\n\\n// pattern:\\n      /下单|place order|make order|сделаем заказ|确认订单|confirm order|proceed with order|create.*order|ready.*order|start.*order/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"下单信号\\\",\\n  },\\n  piSent: /地址|address|delivery.*address|shipping.*address|收货地址|deliver to|ship to|postal code|zip code|country.*city|port of|destination/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"地址已给\\\",\\n  },\\n  quantityConfirmed: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(\\\\d+)\\\\s*(pieces|pcs|units|件|个|套|sets).*(?:确认|confirm|need|want|order|需要|要)/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"数量讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  samples: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /样品|sample|打样|prototype|寄样|send.*sample|sample.*ready|sample.*sent/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"样品阶段\\\",\\n  },\\n  priceDiscussion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /价格|price|quote|报价|quotation|USD|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW|运费|shipping.*cost|freight|每件|per piece|unit price/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"价格/运费讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  productSelection: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /partner|商量|consult|discuss.*partner|合伙|определюсь с партнером|wait.*partner|check.*partner/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"等合伙人商量\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 降级信号关键词\\n// ============================================================\\nconst DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS = {\\n  templateQuestion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /what is your|how many|MOQ|minimum order|what country|please let me know|feel free to|could you please|may I know/i,\\n    desc: \\\"模板提问式消息\\\",\\n  },\\n  genericGreeting: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /^(hi|hello|hey|dear)\\\\b.{0,30}$/i,\\n    desc: \\\"仅打招呼无实质\\\",\\n  },\\n  onlyEmoji: {\\n    pattern: /^\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*(\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*)*$/,\\n    desc: \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = [\\n  \\\"SD\\\", \\\"EG\\\", \\\"CD\\\", \\\"ZM\\\", \\\"CI\\\", \\\"SA\\\", \\\"AE\\\", // 主市场\\n  \\\"IQ\\\", \\\"OM\\\", \\\"BH\\\", \\\"KW\\\", \\\"QA\\\", \\\"JO\\\", \\\"LY\\\", \\\"LB\\\", // 中东扩展\\n  \\\"GH\\\", \\\"SN\\\", \\\"KE\\\", \\\"TZ\\\", \\\"CM\\\", \\\"ML\\\", \\\"GN\\\", \\\"ZW\\\", // 非洲扩展\\n];\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const downgrades = [];\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(UPGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      upgrades.push({ key, weight: sig.weight, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      downgrades.push({ key, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return { upgrades, downgrades };\\n}\\n\\nfunction isOurMessage(c) {\\n  return c.latestType === \\\"send\\\";\\n}\\n\\nfunction isCustomerMessage(c) {\\n  return c.latestType === \\\"received\\\";\\n}\\n\\nfunction evidence.push(\\\"纯系统消息+近期互动→P3（需确认是否为真人对话）\\\");\\n      confidence = 1;\\n    }\\n    checks.push(\\\"系统消息确认\\\");\\n    return { priority, confidence, evidence, checks, actions, tier: \\\"C\\\" };\\n  }\\n\\n  // hasAddress + 我方追问地址/运费 → 谈判活跃\\n  if (c.flags.hasAddress && totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 5) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"地址已确认+多重升级信号+近期活跃→P0\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 强升级信号 (PI/付款/下单)\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 3 && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`强升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P0`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级 + 核心市场\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7 && isCore) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+核心市场+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 我方发送 → 需要看是否有客户之前发过消息\\n  else if (c.isUnread && ourMsg && silenceDays <= 3) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`未读消息+我方最近发送+${silenceDays}天→P1（需确认客户是否有回应）`);\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 客户发送 → 可能重要\\n  else if (c.isUnread && custMsg) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"未读消息+客户发送→P0（客户主动联系，高优先）\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 有地址标记 + 近期活跃\\n  else if (c.flags.hasAddress && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`有地址+${silenceDays}天内活跃→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 核心市场 + 近期活跃 + 有实质内容\\n  else if (isCore && silenceDays <= 7 && c.latestMsg && (c.flags.needLookback) {\\n    priority = \\\"P2\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"最后消息为表情/单字+无法判断真实阶段→暂P2\\\");\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n  // 我方模板提问 + 客户沉默>3天 → 降级\\n  else if (hasDowngrade && ourMsg && silenceDays > 3) {\\n    if (silenceDays > 14) {\\n      priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"模板提问+客户沉默超14天→P3\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    } else {\\n      priority = \\\"P2\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"模板提问+客户沉默${silenceDays}天→P2\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    }\\n  }\\n  // 长期沉默\\n  else if (silenceDays > 60) {\\n    priority = \\\"P4\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P4`);\\n    confidence = 3;\\n  } else if (silenceDays > 30) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P3`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 我方消息 + 客户从未回复\\n  else if (ourMsg && c.direction.total <= 1 && silenceDays > 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"我方单向发送+客户无回应超7天→P3\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 默认：保持规则分类 + 降低置信度\\n  else {\\n    evidence.push(\\\"信号不足，维持规则分类\\\");\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n\\n  // ---- 修正不合理分类 ----\\n  // 如果规则分了P0但最新消息只是我方模板提问 → 降级\\n  if (c._rulePriority === \\\"P0\\\" priority,\\n    confidence,\\n    stars,\\n    evidence,\\n    checks,\\n    actions,\\n    tier,\\n    upgradeSignals: signals.upgrades,\\n    downgradeSignals: signals.downgrades,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 主流程\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nconsole.log(\\\"=\\\".repeat(60));\\nconsole.log(\\\"阶段2：AI 分类 + 证据摘要 + 置信度评分\\\");\\nconsole.log(\\\"=\\\".repeat(60));\\n\\nconst data = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(inputFile, \\\"utf8\\\"));\\nconst needAI = data.customers.filter((c) => c._needAI);\\nconst const aiEntry = {\\n    ...c,\\n    _aiPriority: result.priority,\\n    _aiConfidence: result.confidence,\\n    _aiStars: result.stars,\\n    _aiEvidence: result.evidence,\\n    _aiChecks: /地址|address|delivery.*address|shipping.*address|收货地址|deliver to|ship to|postal code|zip code|country.*city|port of|destination/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"地址已给\\\",\\n  },\\n  quantityConfirmed: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(\\\\d+)\\\\s*(pieces|pcs|units|件|个|套|sets).*(?:确认|confirm|need|want|order|需要|要)/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"数量讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  samples: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /样品|sample|打样|prototype|寄样|send.*sample|sample.*ready|sample.*sent/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"样品阶段\\\",\\n  },\\n  priceDiscussion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /价格|price|quote|报价|quotation|USD|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW|运费|shipping.*cost|freight|每件|per piece|unit price/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"价格/运费讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  productSelection: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /partner|商量|consult|discuss.*partner|合伙|определюсь с партнером|wait.*partner|check.*partner/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"等合伙人商量\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 降级信号关键词\\n// ============================================================\\nconst DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS = {\\n  templateQuestion: {\\n pattern:\\n      /^(hi|hello|hey|dear)\\\\b.{0,30}$/i,\\n    desc: \\\"仅打招呼无实质\\\",\\n  },\\n  onlyEmoji: {\\n    pattern: /^\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*(\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*)*$/,\\n    desc: \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = [\\n  \\\"SD\\\", \\\"EG\\\", \\\"CD\\\", \\\"ZM\\\", \\\"CI\\\", \\\"SA\\\", \\\"AE\\\", // 主市场\\n  \\\"IQ\\\", \\\"OM\\\", \\\"BH\\\", \\\"KW\\\", \\\"QA\\\", \\\"JO\\\", \\\"LY\\\", \\\"LB\\\", // 中东扩展\\n  \\\"GH\\\", \\\"SN\\\", \\\"KE\\\", \\\"TZ\\\", \\\"CM\\\", \\\"ML\\\", \\\"GN\\\", \\\"ZW\\\", // 非洲扩展\\n];\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const downgrades = [];\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(UPGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      upgrades.push({ key, weight: sig.weight, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      downgrades.push({ key, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return { upgrades, evidence.push(\\\"纯系统消息+近期互动→P3（需确认是否为真人对话）\\\");\\n      confidence = 1;\\n    }\\n    checks.push(\\\"系统消息确认\\\");\\n    return { priority, confidence, evidence, checks, actions, tier: \\\"C\\\" };\\n  }\\n\\n  // hasAddress + 我方追问地址/运费 → 谈判活跃\\n  if (c.flags.hasAddress && totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 5) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n evidence.push(`强升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P0`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级 + 核心市场\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7 && isCore) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+核心市场+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 我方发送 → 需要看是否有客户之前发过消息\\n  else if (c.isUnread && ourMsg &&    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`有地址+${silenceDays}天内活跃→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 核心市场 + 近期活跃 + 有实质内容\\n  else if (isCore && silenceDays <= 7 && c.latestMsg && c.latestMsg.length > 30) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`核心市场+${silenceDays}天内活跃+有实质内容→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // needLookback → 最后一条是表情/单字，数据不够\\n  else if (c.flags.needLookback) {\\n    priority = \\\"P2\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"最后消息为表情/单字+无法判断真实阶段→暂P2\\\");\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n  // 我方模板提问 + 客户沉默>3天 → 降级\\n  else if (hasDowngrade && ourMsg && silenceDays > 3) {\\n    if (silenceDays > 14) {\\n      priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"模板提问+客户沉默超14天→P3\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    } else {\\n      priority = \\\"P2\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"模板提问+客户沉默${silenceDays}天→P2\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    }\\n  }\\n  // 长期沉默\\n  else if (silenceDays > 60) {\\n    priority = \\\"P4\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P4`);\\n    confidence = 3;\\n  } else if (silenceDays > 30) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P3`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 我方消息 + 客户从未回复\\n  else if (ourMsg && c.direction.total <= 1 && silenceDays > 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"我方单向发送+客户无回应超7天→P3\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 默认：保持规则分类 + 降低置信度\\n  else {\\n    evidence.push(\\\"信号不足，维持规则分类\\\");\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n\\n  // ---- 修正不合理分类 ----\\n  // 如果规则分了P0但最新消息只是我方模板提问 → 降级\\n  if (c._rulePriority === \\\"P0\\\" priority,\\n    confidence,\\n    stars,\\n    evidence,\\n    checks,\\n    actions,\\n    tier,\\n    upgradeSignals: signals.upgrades,\\n    downgradeSignals: signals.downgrades,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n// content.text:
Base directory for this skill: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\plugins\cache\thedotmack\claude-mem\12.5.1\skills\smart-explore

# Smart Explore

Structural code exploration using AST parsing. **This skill overrides your default exploration behavior.** While this skill is active, use smart_search/smart_outline/smart_unfold as your primary tools instead of Read, Grep, and Glob.

**Core principle:** Index first, fetch on demand. Give yourself a map of the code before loading implementation details. The question before every file read should be: "do I need to see all of this, or can I get a structural overview first?" The answer is almost always: get the map.

## Your Next Tool Call

This skill only loads instructions. You must call the MCP tools yourself. Your next action should be one of:

```
smart_search(query="<topic>", path="./src")    -- discover files + symbols across a directory
smart_outline(file_path="<file>")              -- structural skeleton of one file
smart_unfold(file_path="<file>", symbol_name="<name>")  -- full source of one symbol
```

Do NOT run Grep, Glob, Read, or find to discover files first. `smart_search` walks directories, parses all code files, and returns ranked symbols in one call. It replaces the Glob → Grep → Read discovery cycle.

## 3-Layer Workflow

### Step 1: Search -- Discover Files and Symbols

```
smart_search(query="shutdown", path="./src", max_results=15)
```

**Returns:** Ranked symbols with signatures, line numbers, match reasons, plus folded file views (~2-6k tokens)

```
-- Matching Symbols --
  function performGracefulShutdown (services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts:56)
  function httpShutdown (services/infrastructure/HealthMonitor.ts:92)
  method WorkerService.shutdown (services/worker-service.ts:846)

-- Folded File Views --
  services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts (7 symbols)
  services/worker-service.ts (12 symbols)
```

This is your discovery tool. It finds relevant files AND shows their structure. No Glob/find pre-scan needed.

**Parameters:**

- `query` (string, required) -- What to search for (function name, concept, class name)
- `path` (string) -- Root directory to search (defaults to cwd)
- `max_results` (number) -- Max matching symbols, default 20, max 50
- `file_pattern` (string, optional) -- Filter to specific files/paths

### Step 2: Outline -- Get File Structure

```
smart_outline(file_path="services/worker-service.ts")
```

**Returns:** Complete structural skeleton -- all functions, classes, methods, properties, imports (~1-2k tokens per file)

**Skip this step** when Step 1's folded file views already provide enough structure. Most useful for files not covered by the search results.

**Parameters:**

- `file_path` (string, required) -- Path to the file

### Step 3: Unfold -- See Implementation

Review symbols from Steps 1-2. Pick the ones you need. Unfold only those:

```
smart_unfold(file_path="services/worker-service.ts", symbol_name="shutdown")
```

**Returns:** Full source code of the specified symbol including JSDoc, decorators, and complete implementation (~400-2,100 tokens depending on symbol size). AST node boundaries guarantee completeness regardless of symbol size — unlike Read + agent summarization, which may truncate long methods.

**Parameters:**

- `file_path` (string, required) -- Path to the file (as returned by search/outline)
- `symbol_name` (string, required) -- Name of the function/class/method to expand

## When to Use Standard Tools Instead

Use these only when smart_* tools are the wrong fit:

- **Grep:** Exact string/regex search ("find all TODO comments", "where is `ensureWorkerStarted` defined?")
- **Read:** Small files under ~100 lines, non-code files (JSON, markdown, config)
- **Glob:** File path patterns ("find all test files")
- **Explore agent:** When you need synthesized understanding across 6+ files, architecture narratives, or answers to open-ended questions like "how does this entire system work end-to-end?" Smart-explore is a scalpel — it answers "where is this?" and "show me that." It doesn't synthesize cross-file data flows, design decisions, or edge cases across an entire feature.

For code files over ~100 lines, prefer smart_outline + smart_unfold over Read.

## Workflow Examples

**Discover how a feature works (cross-cutting):**

```
1. smart_search(query="shutdown", path="./src")
   -> 14 symbols across 7 files, full picture in one call
2. smart_unfold(file_path="services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts", symbol_name="performGracefulShutdown")
   -> See the core implementation
```

**Navigate a large file:**

```
1. smart_outline(file_path="services/worker-service.ts")
   -> 1,466 tokens: 12 functions, WorkerService class with 24 members
2. smart_unfold(file_path="services/worker-service.ts", symbol_name="startSessionProcessor")
   -> 1,610 tokens: the specific method you need
Total: ~3,076 tokens vs ~12,000 to Read the full file
```

**Write documentation about code (hybrid workflow):**

```
1. smart_search(query="feature name", path="./src")    -- discover all relevant files and symbols
2. smart_outline on key files                           -- understand structure
3. smart_unfold on important functions                  -- get implementation details
4. Read on small config/markdown/plan files             -- get non-code context
```

Use smart_* tools for code exploration, Read for non-code files. Mix freely.

**Exploration then precision:**

```
1. smart_search(query="session", path="./src", max_results=10)
   -> 10 ranked symbols: SessionMetadata, SessionQueueProcessor, SessionSummary...
2. Pick the relevant one, unfold it
```

## Token Economics

| Approach | Tokens | Use Case |
|----------|--------|----------|
| smart_outline | ~1,000-2,000 | "What's in this file?" |
| smart_unfold | ~400-2,100 | "Show me this function" |
| smart_search | ~2,000-6,000 | "Find all X across the codebase" |
| search + unfold | ~3,000-8,000 | End-to-end: find and read (the primary workflow) |
| Read (full file) | ~12,000+ | When you truly need everything |
| Explore agent | ~39,000-59,000 | Cross-file synthesis with narrative |

**4-8x savings** on file understanding (outline + unfold vs Read). **11-18x savings** on codebase exploration vs Explore agent. The narrower the query, the wider the gap — a 27-line function costs 55x less to read via unfold than via an Explore agent, because the agent still reads the entire file.

## Language Support

Smart-explore uses **tree-sitter AST parsing** for structural analysis. Unsupported file types fall back to text-based search.

### Bundled Languages

| Language | Extensions |
|----------|-----------|
| JavaScript | `.js`, `.mjs`, `.cjs` |
| TypeScript | `.ts` |
| TSX / JSX | `.tsx`, `.jsx` |
| Python | `.py`, `.pyw` |
| Go | `.go` |
| Rust | `.rs` |
| Ruby | `.rb` |
| Java | `.java` |
| C | `.c`, `.h` |
| C++ | `.cpp`, `.cc`, `.cxx`, `.hpp`, `.hh` |

Files with unrecognized extensions are parsed as plain text — `smart_search` still works (grep-style), but `smart_outline` and `smart_unfold` will not extract structured symbols.

### Custom Grammars (`.claude-mem.json`)

You can register additional tree-sitter grammars for file types not in the bundled list. Create or update `.claude-mem.json` in your project root:

```json
{
  "grammars": {
    ".sol": "tree-sitter-solidity",
    ".graphql": "tree-sitter-graphql"
  }
}
```

Each key is a file extension; each value is the npm package name of the tree-sitter grammar. The grammar must be installed locally (`npm install tree-sitter-solidity`). Once registered, `smart_outline` and `smart_unfold` will parse those extensions structurally instead of falling back to plain text.

### Markdown Special Support

Markdown files (`.md`, `.mdx`) receive special handling beyond the generic plain-text fallback:

- **`smart_outline`** — extracts headings (`#`, `##`, `###`) as the symbol tree. Use it to navigate long documents without reading the full file.
- **`smart_search`** — searches within code fences as well as prose, so queries for function names inside ` ```ts ``` ` blocks work as expected.
- **`smart_unfold`** — expands heading sections rather than function bodies; each section up to the next same-level heading is returned as a chunk.
- **Frontmatter** — YAML frontmatter (lines between leading `---` delimiters) is included in `smart_outline` output under a synthetic `frontmatter` symbol so metadata like `title:` and `description:` is visible without reading the whole file.

pattern:\\n      /下单|place order|make order|сделаем заказ|确认订单|confirm order|proceed with order|create.*order|ready.*order|start.*order/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"下单信号\\\",\\n  },\\n  piSent: {\\n    pattern: /PI|proforma invoice|形式发票|发票.*已发|PI.*sent|send.*PI/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"PI相关\\\",\\n  },\\n  payment: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /付款|payment|deposit|定金|预付|advance|bank /地址|address|delivery.*address|shipping.*address|收货地址|deliver to|ship to|postal code|zip code|country.*city|port of|destination/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"地址已给\\\",\\n  },\\n  quantityConfirmed: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(\\\\d+)\\\\s*(pieces|pcs|units|件|个|套|sets).*(?:确认|confirm|need|want|order|需要|要)/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"数量讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  samples: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /样品|sample|打样|prototype|寄样|send.*sample|sample.*ready|sample.*sent/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"样品阶段\\\",\\n  },\\n  priceDiscussion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /价格|price|quote|报价|quotation|USD|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW|运费|shipping.*cost|freight|每件|per piece|unit price/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"价格/运费讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  productSelection: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /partner|商量|consult|discuss.*partner|合伙|определюсь с партнером|wait.*partner|check.*partner/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"等合伙人商量\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 降级信号关键词\\n// ============================================================\\nconst DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS = {\\n  templateQuestion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /what is your|how many|MOQ|minimum order|what country|please let me know|feel free to|could you please|may I know/i,\\n    desc: \\\"模板提问式消息\\\",\\n  },\\n  genericGreeting: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /^(hi|hello|hey|dear)\\\\b.{0,30}$/i,\\n    desc: \\\"仅打招呼无实质\\\",\\n  },\\n  onlyEmoji: {\\n    pattern: /^\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*(\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*)*$/,\\n    desc: \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = [\\n  \\\"SD\\\", \\\"EG\\\", \\\"CD\\\", \\\"ZM\\\", \\\"CI\\\", \\\"SA\\\", \\\"AE\\\", // 主市场\\n  \\\"IQ\\\", \\\"OM\\\", \\\"BH\\\", \\\"KW\\\", \\\"QA\\\", \\\"JO\\\", \\\"LY\\\", \\\"LB\\\", // 中东扩展\\n  \\\"GH\\\", \\\"SN\\\", \\\"KE\\\", \\\"TZ\\\", \\\"CM\\\", \\\"ML\\\", \\\"GN\\\", \\\"ZW\\\", // 非洲扩展\\n];\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const downgrades = [];\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(UPGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      upgrades.push({ key, weight: sig.weight, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      downgrades.push({ key, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return { upgrades, evidence.push(\\\"纯系统消息+近期互动→P3（需确认是否为真人对话）\\\");\\n      confidence = 1;\\n    }\\n    checks.push(\\\"系统消息确认\\\");\\n    return { priority, confidence, evidence, checks, actions, tier: \\\"C\\\" };\\n  }\\n\\n  // hasAddress + 我方追问地址/运费 → 谈判活跃\\n  if (c.flags.hasAddress && totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 5) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n evidence.push(`强升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P0`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级 + 核心市场\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7 && isCore) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+核心市场+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 我方发送 → 需要看是否有客户之前发过消息\\n  else if (c.isUnread && ourMsg &&    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`有地址+${silenceDays}天内活跃→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 核心市场 + 近期活跃 + 有实质内容\\n  else if (isCore && silenceDays <= 7 && c.latestMsg && (c.flags.needLookback) {\\n    priority = \\\"P2\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"最后消息为表情/单字+无法判断真实阶段→暂P2\\\");\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n  // 我方模板提问 + 客户沉默>3天 → 降级\\n  else if (hasDowngrade && ourMsg && silenceDays > 3) {\\n    if (silenceDays > 14) {\\n      priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"模板提问+客户沉默超14天→P3\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    } else {\\n      priority = \\\"P2\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"模板提问+客户沉默${silenceDays}天→P2\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    }\\n  }\\n  // 长期沉默\\n  else if (silenceDays > 60) {\\n    priority = \\\"P4\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P4`);\\n    confidence = 3;\\n  } else if (silenceDays > 30) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P3`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 我方消息 + 客户从未回复\\n  else if (ourMsg && c.direction.total <= 1 && silenceDays > 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"我方单向发送+客户无回应超7天→P3\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 默认：保持规则分类 + 降低置信度\\n  else {\\n    evidence.push(\\\"信号不足，维持规则分类\\\");\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n\\n  // ---- 修正不合理分类 ----\\n  // 如果规则分了P0但最新消息只是我方模板提问 → 降级\\n  if (c._rulePriority === \\\"P0\\\" checks.push(`降级信号:${signals.downgrades.map((d) => d.desc).join(\\\"+\\\") || \\\"无\\\"}`);\\n\\n  // 置信度标记\\n  const stars = confidence === 3 ? \\\"★★★\\\" : confidence === 2 ? \\\"★★☆\\\" : \\\"★☆☆\\\";\\n\\n  // 层级\\n  let tier;\\n  if (priority === \\\"P0\\\") tier = \\\"A\\\";\\n  else if (priority === \\\"P1\\\") tier = \\\"B\\\";\\n  else tier = \\\"C\\\";\\n\\n  return {\\n    priority,\\n    confidence,\\n    stars,\\n    evidence,\\n    checks,\\n    actions,\\n    tier,\\n    upgradeSignals: signals.upgrades,\\n    downgradeSignals: signals.downgrades,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n// \\\"classified_rules_2026-05-04T07-48-48.json\\\");\\nconst outputFile = path.join(\\n  DATA_DIR,\\n  `classified_ai_${new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, \\\"-\\\")}.json`\\n);\\n\\n//
