pattern:\\n      /下单|place order|make order|сделаем заказ|确认订单|confirm order|proceed with order|create.*order|ready.*order|start.*order/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"下单信号\\\",\\n  },\\n  piSent: {\\n    pattern: /PI|proforma invoice|形式发票|发票.*已发|PI.*sent|send.*PI/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"PI相关\\\",\\n  },\\n  payment: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /付款|payment|deposit|定金|预付|advance|bank transfer|TT|wire transfer|paypal|paid|已付款|balance/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"付款相关\\\",\\n  },\\n  addressGiven: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /地址|address|delivery.*address|shipping.*address|收货地址|deliver to|ship to|postal code|zip code|country.*city|port of|destination/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"地址已给\\\",\\n  },\\n  quantityConfirmed: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(\\\\d+)\\\\s*(pieces|pcs|units|件|个|套|sets).*(?:确认|confirm|need|want|order|需要|要)/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"数量讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  samples: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /样品|sample|打样|prototype|寄样|send.*sample|sample.*ready|sample.*sent/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"样品阶段\\\",\\n  },\\n  priceDiscussion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /价格|price|quote|报价|quotation|USD|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW|运费|shipping.*cost|freight|每件|per piece|unit price/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"价格/运费讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  productSelection: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /partner|商量|consult|discuss.*partner|合伙|определюсь с партнером|wait.*partner|check.*partner/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"等合伙人商量\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 降级信号关键词\\n// ============================================================\\nconst DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS = {\\n  templateQuestion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /what is your|how many|MOQ|minimum order|what country|please let me know|feel free to|could you please|may I know/i,\\n    desc: \\\"模板提问式消息\\\",\\n  },\\n  genericGreeting: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /^(hi|hello|hey|dear)\\\\b.{0,30}$/i,\\n    desc: \\\"仅打招呼无实质\\\",\\n  },\\n  onlyEmoji: {\\n    pattern: /^\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*(\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*)*$/,\\n    desc: \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = [\\n  \\\"SD\\\", \\\"EG\\\", \\\"CD\\\", \\\"ZM\\\", \\\"CI\\\", \\\"SA\\\", \\\"AE\\\", // 主市场\\n  \\\"IQ\\\", \\\"OM\\\", \\\"BH\\\", \\\"KW\\\", \\\"QA\\\", \\\"JO\\\", \\\"LY\\\", \\\"LB\\\", // 中东扩展\\n  \\\"GH\\\", \\\"SN\\\", \\\"KE\\\", \\\"TZ\\\", \\\"CM\\\", \\\"ML\\\", \\\"GN\\\", \\\"ZW\\\", // 非洲扩展\\n];\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const downgrades = [];\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(UPGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      upgrades.push({ key, weight: sig.weight, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n Base directory for this skill: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\plugins\cache\thedotmack\claude-mem\12.5.1\skills\smart-explore

# Smart Explore

Structural code exploration using AST parsing. **This skill overrides your default exploration behavior.** While this skill is active, use smart_search/smart_outline/smart_unfold as your primary tools instead of Read, Grep, and Glob.

**Core principle:** Index first, fetch on demand. Give yourself a map of the code before loading implementation details. The question before every file read should be: "do I need to see all of this, or can I get a structural overview first?" The answer is almost always: get the map.

## Your Next Tool Call

This skill only loads instructions. You must call the MCP tools yourself. Your next action should be one of:

```
smart_search(query="<topic>", path="./src")    -- discover files + symbols across a directory
smart_outline(file_path="<file>")              -- structural skeleton of one file
smart_unfold(file_path="<file>", symbol_name="<name>")  -- full source of one symbol
```

Do NOT run Grep, Glob, Read, or find to discover files first. `smart_search` walks directories, parses all code files, and returns ranked symbols in one call. It replaces the Glob → Grep → Read discovery cycle.

## 3-Layer Workflow

### Step 1: Search -- Discover Files and Symbols

```
smart_search(query="shutdown", path="./src", max_results=15)
```

**Returns:** Ranked symbols with signatures, line numbers, match reasons, plus folded file views (~2-6k tokens)

```
-- Matching Symbols --
  function performGracefulShutdown (services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts:56)
  function httpShutdown (services/infrastructure/HealthMonitor.ts:92)
  method WorkerService.shutdown (services/worker-service.ts:846)

-- Folded File Views --
  services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts (7 symbols)
  services/worker-service.ts (12 symbols)
```

This is your discovery tool. It finds relevant files AND shows their structure. No Glob/find pre-scan needed.

**Parameters:**

- `query` (string, required) -- What to search for (function name, concept, class name)
- `path` (string) -- Root directory to search (defaults to cwd)
- `max_results` (number) -- Max matching symbols, default 20, max 50
- `file_pattern` (string, optional) -- Filter to specific files/paths

### Step 2: Outline -- Get File Structure

```
smart_outline(file_path="services/worker-service.ts")
```

**Returns:** Complete structural skeleton -- all functions, classes, methods, properties, imports (~1-2k tokens per file)

**Skip this step** when Step 1's folded file views already provide enough structure. Most useful for files not covered by the search results.

**Parameters:**

- `file_path` (string, required) -- Path to the file

### Step 3: Unfold -- See Implementation

Review symbols from Steps 1-2. Pick the ones you need. Unfold only those:

```
smart_unfold(file_path="services/worker-service.ts", symbol_name="shutdown")
```

**Returns:** Full source code of the specified symbol including JSDoc, decorators, and complete implementation (~400-2,100 tokens depending on symbol size). AST node boundaries guarantee completeness regardless of symbol size — unlike Read + agent summarization, which may truncate long methods.

**Parameters:**

- `file_path` (string, required) -- Path to the file (as returned by search/outline)
- `symbol_name` (string, required) -- Name of the function/class/method to expand

## When to Use Standard Tools Instead

Use these only when smart_* tools are the wrong fit:

- **Grep:** Exact string/regex search ("find all TODO comments", "where is `ensureWorkerStarted` defined?")
- **Read:** Small files under ~100 lines, non-code files (JSON, markdown, config)
- **Glob:** File path patterns ("find all test files")
- **Explore agent:** When you need synthesized understanding across 6+ files, architecture narratives, or answers to open-ended questions like "how does this entire system work end-to-end?" Smart-explore is a scalpel — it answers "where is this?" and "show me that." It doesn't synthesize cross-file data flows, design decisions, or edge cases across an entire feature.

For code files over ~100 lines, prefer smart_outline + smart_unfold over Read.

## Workflow Examples

**Discover how a feature works (cross-cutting):**

```
1. smart_search(query="shutdown", path="./src")
   -> 14 symbols across 7 files, full picture in one call
2. smart_unfold(file_path="services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts", symbol_name="performGracefulShutdown")
   -> See the core implementation
```

**Navigate a large file:**

```
1. smart_outline(file_path="services/worker-service.ts")
   -> 1,466 tokens: 12 functions, WorkerService class with 24 members
2. smart_unfold(file_path="services/worker-service.ts", symbol_name="startSessionProcessor")
   -> 1,610 tokens: the specific method you need
Total: ~3,076 tokens vs ~12,000 to Read the full file
```

**Write documentation about code (hybrid workflow):**

```
1. smart_search(query="feature name", path="./src")    -- discover all relevant files and symbols
2. smart_outline on key files                           -- understand structure
3. smart_unfold on important functions                  -- get implementation details
4. Read on small config/markdown/plan files             -- get non-code context
```

Use smart_* tools for code exploration, Read for non-code files. Mix freely.

**Exploration then precision:**

```
1. smart_search(query="session", path="./src", max_results=10)
   -> 10 ranked symbols: SessionMetadata, SessionQueueProcessor, SessionSummary...
2. Pick the relevant one, unfold it
```

## Token Economics

| Approach | Tokens | Use Case |
|----------|--------|----------|
| smart_outline | ~1,000-2,000 | "What's in this file?" |
| smart_unfold | ~400-2,100 | "Show me this function" |
| smart_search | ~2,000-6,000 | "Find all X across the codebase" |
| search + unfold | ~3,000-8,000 | End-to-end: find and read (the primary workflow) |
| Read (full file) | ~12,000+ | When you truly need everything |
| Explore agent | ~39,000-59,000 | Cross-file synthesis with narrative |

**4-8x savings** on file understanding (outline + unfold vs Read). **11-18x savings** on codebase exploration vs Explore agent. The narrower the query, the wider the gap — a 27-line function costs 55x less to read via unfold than via an Explore agent, because the agent still reads the entire file.

## Language Support

Smart-explore uses **tree-sitter AST parsing** for structural analysis. Unsupported file types fall back to text-based search.

### Bundled Languages

| Language | Extensions |
|----------|-----------|
| JavaScript | `.js`, `.mjs`, `.cjs` |
| TypeScript | `.ts` |
| TSX / JSX | `.tsx`, `.jsx` |
| Python | `.py`, `.pyw` |
| Go | `.go` |
| Rust | `.rs` |
| Ruby | `.rb` |
| Java | `.java` |
| C | `.c`, `.h` |
| C++ | `.cpp`, `.cc`, `.cxx`, `.hpp`, `.hh` |

Files with unrecognized extensions are parsed as plain text — `smart_search` still works (grep-style), but `smart_outline` and `smart_unfold` will not extract structured symbols.

### Custom Grammars (`.claude-mem.json`)

You can register additional tree-sitter grammars for file types not in the bundled list. Create or update `.claude-mem.json` in your project root:

```json
{
  "grammars": {
    ".sol": "tree-sitter-solidity",
    ".graphql": "tree-sitter-graphql"
  }
}
```

Each key is a file extension; each value is the npm package name of the tree-sitter grammar. The grammar must be installed locally (`npm install tree-sitter-solidity`). Once registered, `smart_outline` and `smart_unfold` will parse those extensions structurally instead of falling back to plain text.

### Markdown Special Support

Markdown files (`.md`, `.mdx`) receive special handling beyond the generic plain-text fallback:

- **`smart_outline`** — extracts headings (`#`, `##`, `###`) as the symbol tree. Use it to navigate long documents without reading the full file.
- **`smart_search`** — searches within code fences as well as prose, so queries for function names inside ` ```ts ``` ` blocks work as expected.
- **`smart_unfold`** — expands heading sections rather than function bodies; each section up to the next same-level heading is returned as a chunk.
- **Frontmatter** — YAML frontmatter (lines between leading `---` delimiters) is included in `smart_outline` output under a synthetic `frontmatter` symbol so metadata like `title:` and `description:` is visible without reading the whole file.

{\\n    pattern: /PI|proforma invoice|形式发票|发票.*已发|PI.*sent|send.*PI/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"PI相关\\\",\\n  },\\n  payment: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /付款|payment|deposit|定金|预付|advance|bank /地址|address|delivery.*address|shipping.*address|收货地址|deliver to|ship to|postal code|zip code|country.*city|port of|destination/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"地址已给\\\",\\n  },\\n  quantityConfirmed: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(\\\\d+)\\\\s*(pieces|pcs|units|件|个|套|sets).*(?:确认|confirm|need|want|order|需要|要)/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"数量讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  samples: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /样品|sample|打样|prototype|寄样|send.*sample|sample.*ready|sample.*sent/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"样品阶段\\\",\\n  },\\n  priceDiscussion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /价格|price|quote|报价|quotation|USD|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW|运费|shipping.*cost|freight|每件|per piece|unit price/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"价格/运费讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  productSelection: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /partner|商量|consult|discuss.*partner|合伙|определюсь с партнером|wait.*partner|check.*partner/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"等合伙人商量\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 降级信号关键词\\n// ============================================================\\nconst DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS = {\\n  templateQuestion: {\\n pattern:\\n      /^(hi|hello|hey|dear)\\\\b.{0,30}$/i,\\n    desc: \\\"仅打招呼无实质\\\",\\n  },\\n  onlyEmoji: {\\n    pattern: /^\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*(\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*)*$/,\\n    desc: \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = [\\n  \\\"SD\\\", \\\"EG\\\", \\\"CD\\\", \\\"ZM\\\", \\\"CI\\\", \\\"SA\\\", \\\"AE\\\", // 主市场\\n  \\\"IQ\\\", \\\"OM\\\", \\\"BH\\\", \\\"KW\\\", \\\"QA\\\", \\\"JO\\\", \\\"LY\\\", \\\"LB\\\", // 中东扩展\\n  \\\"GH\\\", \\\"SN\\\", \\\"KE\\\", \\\"TZ\\\", \\\"CM\\\", \\\"ML\\\", \\\"GN\\\", \\\"ZW\\\", // 非洲扩展\\n];\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const downgrades = [];\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(UPGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      upgrades.push({ key, weight: sig.weight, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      downgrades.push({ key, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return { upgrades, 3;\\n    } else if (silenceDays > 14) {\\n      priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"纯系统消息+超14天无互动→P3\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    } else {\\n      priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"纯系统消息+近期互动→P3（需确认是否为真人对话）\\\");\\n      confidence = 1;\\n    }\\n    checks.push(\\\"系统消息确认\\\");\\n    return { priority, confidence, evidence, checks, actions, tier: \\\"C\\\" };\\n  }\\n\\n  // hasAddress + 我方追问地址/运费 → 谈判活跃\\n  if (c.flags.hasAddress && totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 5) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"地址已确认+多重升级信号+近期活跃→P0\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 强升级信号 (PI/付款/下单)\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 3 && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`强升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P0`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级 + 核心市场\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7 && isCore) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+核心市场+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 我方发送 → 需要看是否有客户之前发过消息\\n  else if (c.isUnread && ourMsg && silenceDays <= 3) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`未读消息+我方最近发送+${silenceDays}天→P1（需确认客户是否有回应）`);\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 客户发送 → 可能重要\\n  else if (c.isUnread && custMsg) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"未读消息+客户发送→P0（客户主动联系，高优先）\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 有地址标记 + 近期活跃\\n  else if (c.flags.hasAddress && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`有地址+${silenceDays}天内活跃→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 核心市场 + 近期活跃 + 有实质内容\\n  else if (isCore && silenceDays <= 7 && c.latestMsg && c.latestMsg.length > 30) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`核心市场+${silenceDays}天内活跃+有实质内容→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // needLookback → 最后一条是表情/单字，数据不够\\n  else if content.text:
Base directory for this skill: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\plugins\cache\thedotmack\claude-mem\12.5.1\skills\do

# Do Plan

You are an ORCHESTRATOR. Deploy subagents to execute *all* work. Do not do the work yourself except to coordinate, route context, and verify that each subagent completed its assigned checklist.

## Execution Protocol

### Rules

- Each phase uses fresh subagents where noted (or when context is large/unclear)
- Assign one clear objective per subagent and require evidence (commands run, outputs, files changed)
- Do not advance to the next step until the assigned subagent reports completion and the orchestrator confirms it matches the plan

### During Each Phase

Deploy an "Implementation" subagent to:
1. Execute the implementation as specified
2. COPY patterns from documentation, don't invent
3. Cite documentation sources in code comments when using unfamiliar APIs
4. If an API seems missing, STOP and verify — don't assume it exists

### After Each Phase

Deploy subagents for each post-phase responsibility:
1. **Run verification checklist** — Deploy a "Verification" subagent to prove the phase worked
2. **Anti-pattern check** — Deploy an "Anti-pattern" subagent to grep for known bad patterns from the plan
3. **Code quality review** — Deploy a "Code Quality" subagent to review changes
4. **Commit only if verified** — Deploy a "Commit" subagent *only after* verification passes; otherwise, do not commit

### Between Phases

Deploy a "Branch/Sync" subagent to:
- Push to working branch after each verified phase
- Prepare the next phase handoff so the next phase's subagents start fresh but have plan context

## Failure Modes to Prevent

- Don't invent APIs that "should" exist — verify against docs
- Don't add undocumented parameters — copy exact signatures
- Don't skip verification — deploy a verification subagent and run the checklist
- Don't commit before verification passes (or without explicit orchestrator approval)

(classified_rules_*.json)\\n * 输出：全量 P0-P4 名单 + 证据链 + 置信度 + 两遍差异报告 + 自检清单\\n *\\n * 两遍法：\\n *   第一遍 — metadata 粗筛（unread/recent/消息方向/沉默天数）\\n *   第二遍 — latestMessageContent 内容信号修正\\n */\\n\\nconst fs = require(\\\"fs\\\");\\nconst path = require(\\\"path\\\");\\n\\nconst DATA_DIR = path.join(__dirname, \\\"..\\\", \\\"data\\\");\\nconst inputFile = path.join(DATA_DIR, \\\"classified_rules_2026-05-04T07-48-48.json\\\");\\nconst outputFile = path.join(\\n  DATA_DIR,\\n  `classified_ai_${new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, \\\"-\\\")}.json`\\n);\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 升级信号关键词\\n// ============================================================\\nconst UPGRADE_SIGNALS = {\\n  orderReady: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /下单|place order|make order|сделаем заказ|确认订单|confirm order|proceed with order|create.*order|ready.*order|start.*order/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"下单信号\\\",\\n  },\\n  piSent: {\\n    pattern: /PI|proforma invoice|形式发票|发票.*已发|PI.*sent|send.*PI/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"PI相关\\\",\\n  },\\n  payment: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /付款|payment|deposit|定金|预付|advance|bank transfer|TT|wire transfer|paypal|paid|已付款|balance/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"付款相关\\\",\\n  },\\n  addressGiven: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /地址|address|delivery.*address|shipping.*address|收货地址|deliver to|ship to|postal code|zip code|country.*city|port of|destination/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"地址已给\\\",\\n  },\\n  quantityConfirmed: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(\\\\d+)\\\\s*(pieces|pcs|units|件|个|套|sets).*(?:确认|confirm|need|want|order|需要|要)/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"数量讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  samples: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /样品|sample|打样|prototype|寄样|send.*sample|sample.*ready|sample.*sent/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"样品阶段\\\",\\n  },\\n  priceDiscussion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /价格|price|quote|报价|quotation|USD|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW|运费|shipping.*cost|freight|每件|per piece|unit price/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"价格/运费讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  productSelection: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /partner|商量|consult|discuss.*partner|合伙|определюсь с партнером|wait.*partner|check.*partner/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"等合伙人商量\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 降级信号关键词\\n// ============================================================\\nconst DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS = {\\n  templateQuestion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /what is your|how many|MOQ|minimum order|what country|please let me know|feel free to|could you please|may I know/i,\\n    desc: \\\"模板提问式消息\\\",\\n  },\\n  genericGreeting: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /^(hi|hello|hey|dear)\\\\b.{0,30}$/i,\\n    desc: \\\"仅打招呼无实质\\\",\\n  },\\n  onlyEmoji: {\\n    pattern: /^\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*(\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*)*$/,\\n    desc: \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = [\\n  \\\"SD\\\", \\\"EG\\\", \\\"CD\\\", \\\"ZM\\\", \\\"CI\\\", \\\"SA\\\", \\\"AE\\\", // 主市场\\n  \\\"IQ\\\", \\\"OM\\\", \\\"BH\\\", \\\"KW\\\", \\\"QA\\\", \\\"JO\\\", \\\"LY\\\", \\\"LB\\\", // 中东扩展\\n  \\\"GH\\\", \\\"SN\\\", \\\"KE\\\", \\\"TZ\\\", \\\"CM\\\", \\\"ML\\\", \\\"GN\\\", \\\"ZW\\\", // 非洲扩展\\n];\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const downgrades = [];\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(UPGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      upgrades.push({ key, weight: sig.weight, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      downgrades.push({ key, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return { upgrades, downgrades };\\n}\\n\\nfunction isOurMessage(c) {\\n  return c.latestType === \\\"send\\\";\\n}\\n\\nfunction isCustomerMessage(c) {\\n  return c.latestType === \\\"received\\\";\\n}\\n\\nfunction isPureSystemOrBot(c) {\\n  // 纯系统消息 + 无实质对话\\n  if (c.flags.isLatestSystemMsg) return true;\\n  if (c.direction.total <= 1 && isOurMessage(c) && !c.latestMsg) return true;\\n  return false;\\n}\\n\\nfunction classifyCustomer(c) {\\n  const signals = detectSignals(c.latestMsg);\\n  const totalUpgradeWeight = signals.upgrades.reduce((s, u) => s + u.weight, 0);\\n  const hasDowngrade {\\n    pattern: /PI|proforma invoice|形式发票|发票.*已发|PI.*sent|send.*PI/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"PI相关\\\",\\n  },\\n  payment: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /付款|payment|deposit|定金|预付|advance|bank /地址|address|delivery.*address|shipping.*address|收货地址|deliver to|ship to|postal code|zip code|country.*city|port of|destination/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"地址已给\\\",\\n  },\\n  quantityConfirmed: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(\\\\d+)\\\\s*(pieces|pcs|units|件|个|套|sets).*(?:确认|confirm|need|want|order|需要|要)/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"数量讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  samples: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /样品|sample|打样|prototype|寄样|send.*sample|sample.*ready|sample.*sent/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"样品阶段\\\",\\n  },\\n  priceDiscussion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /价格|price|quote|报价|quotation|USD|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW|运费|shipping.*cost|freight|每件|per piece|unit price/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"价格/运费讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  productSelection: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /partner|商量|consult|discuss.*partner|合伙|определюсь с партнером|wait.*partner|check.*partner/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"等合伙人商量\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 降级信号关键词\\n// ============================================================\\nconst DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS = {\\n  templateQuestion: {\\n \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = [\\n  \\\"SD\\\", \\\"EG\\\", \\\"CD\\\", \\\"ZM\\\", \\\"CI\\\", \\\"SA\\\", \\\"AE\\\", // 主市场\\n  \\\"IQ\\\", \\\"OM\\\", \\\"BH\\\", \\\"KW\\\", \\\"QA\\\", \\\"JO\\\", \\\"LY\\\", \\\"LB\\\", // 中东扩展\\n  \\\"GH\\\", \\\"SN\\\", \\\"KE\\\", \\\"TZ\\\", \\\"CM\\\", \\\"ML\\\", \\\"GN\\\", \\\"ZW\\\", // 非洲扩展\\n];\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const }\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      downgrades.push({ key, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return { upgrades, false;\\n}\\n\\nfunction classifyCustomer(c) {\\n  const signals = detectSignals(c.latestMsg);\\n  const totalUpgradeWeight = signals.upgrades.reduce((s, u) => s + u.weight, 0);\\n  const hasDowngrade c.silenceDays;\\n\\n  let priority = c._rulePriority; // 从规则优先级开始\\n  let confidence = 3; // 1=低 2=中 3=高\\n  let evidence = [];\\n  let checks = [];\\n  let actions = [];\\n\\n  // ---- 第一遍：Metadata 3;\\n    } else if (silenceDays > 14) {\\n      priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"纯系统消息+超14天无互动→P3\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    } else {\\n      priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"纯系统消息+近期互动→P3（需确认是否为真人对话）\\\");\\n      confidence = 1;\\n    }\\n    checks.push(\\\"系统消息确认\\\");\\n    return { priority, confidence, evidence, checks, actions, tier: \\\"C\\\" };\\n  }\\n\\n  // hasAddress + 我方追问地址/运费 → 谈判活跃\\n  if (c.flags.hasAddress && totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 5) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"地址已确认+多重升级信号+近期活跃→P0\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 强升级信号 (PI/付款/下单)\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 3 && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n \\\"classified_rules_2026-05-04T07-48-48.json\\\");\\nconst outputFile = path.join(\\n  DATA_DIR,\\n  `classified_ai_${new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, \\\"-\\\")}.json`\\n);\\n\\n// pattern:\\n      /下单|place order|make order|сделаем заказ|确认订单|confirm order|proceed with order|create.*order|ready.*order|start.*order/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"下单信号\\\",\\n  },\\n  piSent: {\\n    pattern: /PI|proforma invoice|形式发票|发票.*已发|PI.*sent|send.*PI/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"PI相关\\\",\\n  },\\n  payment: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /付款|payment|deposit|定金|预付|advance|bank transfer|TT|wire transfer|paypal|paid|已付款|balance/i,\\n    weight: 2,\\n    desc: \\\"付款相关\\\",\\n  },\\n  addressGiven: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /地址|address|delivery.*address|shipping.*address|收货地址|deliver to|ship to|postal code|zip code|country.*city|port of|destination/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"地址已给\\\",\\n  },\\n  quantityConfirmed: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(\\\\d+)\\\\s*(pieces|pcs|units|件|个|套|sets).*(?:确认|confirm|need|want|order|需要|要)/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"数量讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  samples: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /样品|sample|打样|prototype|寄样|send.*sample|sample.*ready|sample.*sent/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"样品阶段\\\",\\n  },\\n  priceDiscussion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /价格|price|quote|报价|quotation|USD|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW|运费|shipping.*cost|freight|每件|per piece|unit price/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"价格/运费讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  productSelection: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /partner|商量|consult|discuss.*partner|合伙|определюсь с партнером|wait.*partner|check.*partner/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"等合伙人商量\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 降级信号关键词\\n// ============================================================\\nconst DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS = {\\n  templateQuestion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /what is your|how many|MOQ|minimum order|what country|please let me know|feel free to|could you please|may I know/i,\\n    desc: \\\"模板提问式消息\\\",\\n  },\\n  genericGreeting: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /^(hi|hello|hey|dear)\\\\b.{0,30}$/i,\\n    desc: \\\"仅打招呼无实质\\\",\\n  },\\n  onlyEmoji: {\\n    pattern: /^\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*(\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*)*$/,\\n    desc: \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = [\\n  \\\"SD\\\", \\\"EG\\\", \\\"CD\\\", \\\"ZM\\\", \\\"CI\\\", \\\"SA\\\", \\\"AE\\\", // 主市场\\n  \\\"IQ\\\", \\\"OM\\\", \\\"BH\\\", \\\"KW\\\", \\\"QA\\\", \\\"JO\\\", \\\"LY\\\", \\\"LB\\\", // 中东扩展\\n  \\\"GH\\\", \\\"SN\\\", \\\"KE\\\", \\\"TZ\\\", \\\"CM\\\", \\\"ML\\\", \\\"GN\\\", \\\"ZW\\\", // 非洲扩展\\n];\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const downgrades = [];\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(UPGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      upgrades.push({ key, weight: sig.weight, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      downgrades.push({ key, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return { upgrades, downgrades };\\n}\\n\\nfunction isOurMessage(c) {\\n  return c.latestType === \\\"send\\\";\\n}\\n\\nfunction isCustomerMessage(c) {\\n  return c.latestType === \\\"received\\\";\\n}\\n\\nfunction isPureSystemOrBot(c) {\\n  // 纯系统消息 + 无实质对话\\n  if (c.flags.isLatestSystemMsg) return true;\\n  if (c.direction.total <= 1 && isOurMessage(c) && !c.latestMsg) return true;\\n  return false;\\n}\\n\\nfunction classifyCustomer(c) {\\n  const signals = detectSignals(c.latestMsg);\\n  const totalUpgradeWeight = signals.upgrades.reduce((s, u) => s + u.weight, 0);\\n  const hasDowngrade = signals.downgrades.length > 0;\\n  const isCore = CORE_MARKETS.includes(c.country);\\n  const ourMsg = isOurMessage(c);\\n  const custMsg = isCustomerMessage(c);\\n  const silenceDays = c.silenceDays;\\n\\n  let priority = c._rulePriority; // 从规则优先级开始\\n  let confidence = 3; // 1=低 2=中 3=高\\n  let evidence = [];\\n  let checks = [];\\n  let actions = [];\\n\\n  // ---- 第一遍：Metadata 粗筛 ----\\n\\n  // 纯系统消息/机器人 → 大幅降级\\n  if (isPureSystemOrBot(c)) {\\n    if (silenceDays > 30) {\\n      priority = \\\"P4\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"纯系统消息+超30天无互动→P4\\\");\\n      confidence = 3;\\n    } else if (silenceDays > 14) {\\n      priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"纯系统消息+超14天无互动→P3\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    } else {\\n      priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"纯系统消息+近期互动→P3（需确认是否为真人对话）\\\");\\n      confidence = 1;\\n    }\\n    checks.push(\\\"系统消息确认\\\");\\n    return { priority, confidence, evidence, checks, actions, tier: \\\"C\\\" };\\n  }\\n\\n  // hasAddress + 我方追问地址/运费 → 谈判活跃\\n  if (c.flags.hasAddress && totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 5) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"地址已确认+多重升级信号+近期活跃→P0\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 强升级信号 (PI/付款/下单)\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 3 && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`强升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P0`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级 + 核心市场\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7 && isCore) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+核心市场+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 中强升级\\n  else if (totalUpgradeWeight >= 2 && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 我方发送 → 需要看是否有客户之前发过消息\\n  else if (c.isUnread && ourMsg && silenceDays <= 3) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`未读消息+我方最近发送+${silenceDays}天→P1（需确认客户是否有回应）`);\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 客户发送 → 可能重要\\n  else if (c.isUnread && custMsg) {\\n    priority = \\\"P0\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"未读消息+客户发送→P0（客户主动联系，高优先）\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 有地址标记 + 近期活跃\\n  else if (c.flags.hasAddress && silenceDays <= 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`有地址+${silenceDays}天内活跃→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 核心市场 + 近期活跃 + 有实质内容\\n  else if (isCore && silenceDays <= 7 && c.latestMsg && c.latestMsg.length > 30) {\\n    priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`核心市场+${silenceDays}天内活跃+有实质内容→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // needLookback → 最后一条是表情/单字，数据不够\\n  else if (c.flags.needLookback) {\\n    priority = \\\"P2\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"最后消息为表情/单字+无法判断真实阶段→暂P2\\\");\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n  // 我方模板提问 + 客户沉默>3天 → 降级\\n  else if (hasDowngrade && ourMsg && silenceDays > 3) {\\n    if (silenceDays > 14) {\\n      priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"模板提问+客户沉默超14天→P3\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    } else {\\n      priority = \\\"P2\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"模板提问+客户沉默${silenceDays}天→P2\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    }\\n  }\\n  // 长期沉默\\n  else if (silenceDays > 60) {\\n    priority = \\\"P4\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P4`);\\n    confidence = 3;\\n  } else if (silenceDays > 30) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P3`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 我方消息 + 客户从未回复\\n  else if (ourMsg && c.direction.total <= 1 && silenceDays > 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"我方单向发送+客户无回应超7天→P3\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 默认：保持规则分类 + 降低置信度\\n  else {\\n    evidence.push(\\\"信号不足，维持规则分类\\\");\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n\\n  // ---- 修正不合理分类 ----\\n  // 如果规则分了P0但最新消息只是我方模板提问 → 降级\\n  if (c._rulePriority === \\\"P0\\\" && hasDowngrade && ourMsg) {\\n    if (silenceDays <= 3) {\\n      priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"规则P0但实为我方模板提问→降为P1\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    } else {\\n      priority = \\\"P2\\\";\\n      evidence.push(\\\"规则P0但实为我方模板提问+已沉默→降为P2\\\");\\n      confidence = 2;\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // 如果规则分了P1但实际是需要往前看才能判断 → 降低置信度\\n  if (c._rulePriority === \\\"P1\\\" && c.flags.needLookback && !totalUpgradeWeight) {\\n    priority = \\\"P2\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"规则P1但最后消息为表情/单字+无升级信号→降为P2\\\");\\n    confidence = 1;\\n  }\\n\\n  // ---- 构建证据链 ----\\n  checks.push(`系统消息:${c.flags.isLatestSystemMsg ? \\\"是\\\" : \\\"否\\\"}`);\\n  checks.push(`产品代码:${c.flags.hasProductSelection ? \\\"有\\\" : \\\"无\\\"}`);\\n  checks.push(`地址:${c.flags.hasAddress ? checks.push(`降级信号:${signals.downgrades.map((d) => d.desc).join(\\\"+\\\") || \\\"无\\\"}`);\\n\\n  // 置信度标记\\n  const stars = confidence === 3 ? \\\"★★★\\\" : confidence === 2 ? \\\"★★☆\\\" : \\\"★☆☆\\\";\\n\\n  // 层级\\n  let tier;\\n  if (priority === \\\"P0\\\") tier = \\\"A\\\";\\n  else if (priority === \\\"P1\\\") tier = \\\"B\\\";\\n  else tier = \\\"C\\\";\\n\\n  return {\\n    priority,\\n    confidence,\\n    stars,\\n    evidence,\\n    checks,\\n    actions,\\n    tier,\\n    upgradeSignals: signals.upgrades,\\n    downgradeSignals: signals.downgrades,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 主流程\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nconsole.log(\\\"=\\\".repeat(60));\\nconsole.log(\\\"阶段2：AI 分类 + 证据摘要 + 置信度评分\\\");\\nconsole.log(\\\"=\\\".repeat(60));\\n\\nconst data = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(inputFile, \\\"utf8\\\"));\\nconst needAI = data.customers.filter((c) => c._needAI);\\nconst ${needAI.length}`);\\n\\n// 对needAI客户执行AI分类\\nconst aiResults = [];\\nconst diffReport = [];\\nconst lowConfidence = [];\\n\\nfor (const c of needAI) {\\n  const result = classifyCustomer(c);\\n\\n  const aiEntry = {\\n    ...c,\\n    _aiPriority: result.priority,\\n    _aiConfidence: result.confidence,\\n    _aiStars: result.stars,\\n    _aiEvidence: result.evidence,\\n    _aiChecks: }\\n\\n  // 低置信度清单\\n  if (result.confidence <= 1) {\\n    lowConfidence.push({\\n      name: c.name,\\n      country: c.countryCode,\\n      priority: result.priority,\\n      reason: = {};\\nallClassified.forEach((c) => {\\n  const p = c.priority;\\n  byPriority[p] = (byPriority[p] || 0) + 1;\\n});\\n\\nconsole.log(\\\"\\\\n--- AI分类后分布 ---\\\");\\nfor (const [p, count] of /地址|address|delivery.*address|shipping.*address|收货地址|deliver to|ship to|postal code|zip code|country.*city|port of|destination/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"地址已给\\\",\\n  },\\n  quantityConfirmed: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(\\\\d+)\\\\s*(pieces|pcs|units|件|个|套|sets).*(?:确认|confirm|need|want|order|需要|要)/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"数量讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  samples: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /样品|sample|打样|prototype|寄样|send.*sample|sample.*ready|sample.*sent/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"样品阶段\\\",\\n  },\\n  priceDiscussion: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /价格|price|quote|报价|quotation|USD|FOB|CIF|DDP|EXW|运费|shipping.*cost|freight|每件|per piece|unit price/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"价格/运费讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  productSelection: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /(CO-\\\\d+|PO-\\\\d+|[A-Z]{2}-\\\\d{2})|选款|choose|select|pick|model|style|款式|颜色|color|size|尺码|码数/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"选款/产品讨论\\\",\\n  },\\n  partnerConsult: {\\n    pattern:\\n      /partner|商量|consult|discuss.*partner|合伙|определюсь с партнером|wait.*partner|check.*partner/i,\\n    weight: 1,\\n    desc: \\\"等合伙人商量\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// pattern:\\n      /^(hi|hello|hey|dear)\\\\b.{0,30}$/i,\\n    desc: \\\"仅打招呼无实质\\\",\\n  },\\n  onlyEmoji: {\\n    pattern: /^\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*(\\\\/:[\\\\w]+\\\\.?\\\\s*)*$/,\\n    desc: \\\"仅表情\\\",\\n  },\\n};\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 核心市场（高优先级）\\n// ============================================================\\nconst CORE_MARKETS = [\\n  \\\"SD\\\", \\\"EG\\\", \\\"CD\\\", \\\"ZM\\\", \\\"CI\\\", \\\"SA\\\", \\\"AE\\\", // 主市场\\n  \\\"IQ\\\", \\\"OM\\\", \\\"BH\\\", \\\"KW\\\", \\\"QA\\\", \\\"JO\\\", \\\"LY\\\", \\\"LB\\\", // 中东扩展\\n  \\\"GH\\\", \\\"SN\\\", \\\"KE\\\", \\\"TZ\\\", \\\"CM\\\", \\\"ML\\\", \\\"GN\\\", \\\"ZW\\\", // 非洲扩展\\n];\\n\\n// ============================================================\\n// 分析函数\\n// ============================================================\\n\\nfunction detectSignals(text) {\\n  if (!text) return { upgrades: [], downgrades: [] };\\n  const upgrades = [];\\n  const downgrades = [];\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(UPGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      upgrades.push({ key, weight: sig.weight, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  for (const [key, sig] of Object.entries(DOWNGRADE_SIGNALS)) {\\n    if (sig.pattern.test(text)) {\\n      downgrades.push({ key, desc: sig.desc });\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  return { upgrades, priority = \\\"P1\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`升级信号(权重${totalUpgradeWeight})+${silenceDays}天内→P1`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 未读消息 + 我方发送 → 需要看是否有客户之前发过消息\\n  else if (c.isUnread && ourMsg && evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P4`);\\n    confidence = 3;\\n  } else if (silenceDays > 30) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(`沉默${silenceDays}天→P3`);\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // 我方消息 + 客户从未回复\\n  else if (ourMsg && c.direction.total <= 1 && silenceDays > 7) {\\n    priority = \\\"P3\\\";\\n    evidence.push(\\\"我方单向发送+客户无回应超7天→P3\\\");\\n    confidence = 2;\\n  }\\n  // priority,\\n    confidence,\\n    stars,\\n    evidence,\\n    checks,\\n    actions,\\n    tier,\\n    upgradeSignals: signals.upgrades,\\n    downgradeSignals: signals.downgrades,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n//   <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"d:\\\\ClaudeWorkspace\\\\08_客户跟进\\\\Okki\\\\scripts\\\\preprocess_cdp.js\",\"content\":\"\\n// ====== 主处理函数 ======\\n\\nfunction getCustomersFromData(data) {\\n  if (Array.isArray(data)) return data;\\n  if (data.customers) return data.customers;\\n  if (data.p0p1) return data.p0p1;\\n  if (data.results) return data.results;\\n  return [];\\n}\\n\\nfunction processCustomer(customer) {\\n  const entry = { ...customer };\\n  const flags = {};\\n  const issues = [];\\n\\n  const rawMsg = entry.latestMessageContent || '';\\n  const isSys = isSystemMessage(rawMsg);\\n\\n  // 1. 系统消息检测\\n  flags.isLatestSystemMsg = isSys;\\n  if (isSys) {\\n    issues.push('latestMessageContent 是系统消息');\\n    // 尝试从消息列表中找真实消息\\n    if (Array.isArray(entry.messages)) {\\n      const real = findLatestRealMessage(entry.messages);\\n      if (real) {\\n        entry._replacedMessageContent = real.text || real.latestMessageContent || '';\\n        entry._replacedFromIndex = entry.messages.indexOf(real);\\n        flags.latestMsgReplaced = true;\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // 2. 表情/单字检测\\n  const effectiveMsg = flags.latestMsgReplaced ? entry._replacedMessageContent : rawMsg;\\n  if (isEmojiOrSingleWord(effectiveMsg)) {\\n    flags.needLookback = true;\\n    issues.push('最后一条有效消息是表情/单字，需往前看');\\n  }\\n\\n  // 3. 消息数统计\\n  const msgCount = entry.messageCount || (Array.isArray(entry.messages) ? entry.messages.length : 0);\\n  entry._computedMessageCount = msgCount;\\n  if (msgCount >= 10) {\\n    flags.needFullRead = true;\\n    issues.push(`消息数 ${msgCount} ≥ 10，必须逐条读取`);\\n  }\\n\\n  // 4. 产品代码扫描\\n  const scanTargets = [effectiveMsg];\\n  if (Array.isArray(entry.messages)) {\\n    for (const m of entry.messages) {\\n      scanTargets.push(m.text || '');\\n    }\\n  }\\n  const allCodes = [];\\n  for (const t of scanTargets) {\\n    allCodes.push(...scanProductCodes(t));\\n  }\\n  const uniqueCodes = [...new Set(allCodes)];\\n  if (uniqueCodes.length > 0) {\\n    flags.hasProductSelection = true;\\n    entry._productCodes = uniqueCodes;\\n  }\\n\\n  // 5. 地址关键词扫描\\n  if (scanAddressKeywords(effectiveMsg) || (Array.isArray(entry.messages) && entry.messages.some((m) => scanAddressKeywords(m.text || '')))) {\\n    flags.hasAddress = true;\\n  }\\n\\n  // 6. 沉默天数\\n  const lastTime = entry.lastContactTime || entry.latestMessageTime;\\n  const silenceDays = calcSilenceDays(lastTime);\\n  entry._silenceDays = silenceDays;\\n\\n  // 7. 消息方向\\n  if (Array.isArray(entry.messages)) {\\n    const dir = calcMessageDirection(entry.messages);\\n    if (dir) {\\n      entry._messageDirection = dir;\\n    }\\n  } else if (entry.latestMessageType) {\\n    entry._messageDirection = {\\n      total: msgCount || 1,\\n      latestDirection: entry.latestMessageType,\\n    };\\n  }\\n\\n  // 8. 合并标记\\n  entry._flags = flags;\\n  entry._issues = issues;\\n\\n  return entry;\\n}\\n\\nfunction processAll(data) {\\n  const customers = getCustomersFromData(data);\\n  const cleaned = customers.map(processCustomer);\\n\",\"numLines\":100,\"startLine\":128,\"totalLines\":322}}"</outcome>

p.test(trimmed));\\n}\\n\\nfunction scanProductCodes(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return [];\\n  const matches = text.match(PRODUCT_CODE_RE) || [];\\n  return [...new Set(matches.map((m) => m.toUpperCase()))];\\n}\\n\\nfunction scanAddressKeywords(text) {\\n  if (!text || typeof text !== 'string') return false;\\n  return ADDRESS_KEYWORDS.some((re) => re.test(text));\\n}\\n\\nfunction calcSilenceDays(lastContactTime) {\\n  if (!lastContactTime) return 999;\\n  const now = Date.now();\\n  const ts = typeof lastContactTime === 'number' ? lastContactTime : new Date(lastContactTime).getTime();\\n  if (isNaN(ts)) return 999;\\n  return Math.floor((now - ts) / 86400000);\\n}\\n\\nfunction calcMessageDirection(messages) {\\n  if (!Array.isArray(messages) || messages.length === 0) return null;\\n  let sent = 0;\\n  let received = 0;\\n  for (const msg of messages) {\\n    if (msg.side === 'sent' || msg.latestMessageType === 'send') sent++;\\n    else if (msg.side === 'received' || msg.latestMessageType === 'received') received++;\\n  }\\n  const total = sent + received;\\n  return {\\n    total,\\n    sent,\\n    received,\\n    ratioFromUs: total > 0 ? (sent / total) : 0,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\nfunction findLatestRealMessage(messages) {\\n  if (!Array.isArray(messages)) return null;\\n  for (let i = messages.length - 1; i >= 0; i--) {\\n    const msg = messages[i];\\n    const text = msg.text || msg.latestMessageContent || '';\\n    if (!isSystemMessage(text)) return msg;\\n  }\\n  return null;\\n}\\n\\n// ====== 主处理函数 ======\\n\\nfunction getCustomersFromData(data) {\\n  if (Array.isArray(data)) return data;\\n  if (data.customers) return data.customers;\\n  if (data.p0p1) return data.p0p1;\\n  if (data.results) return data.results;\\n  return [];\\n}\\n\\nfunction processCustomer(customer) {\\n  const entry = { ...customer };\\n\\n  // ====== 字段标准化（兼容extract_cdp和全量客户分类两种格式） ======\\n  // extract_cdp 格式：{ name, timeStr, isUnread, message, daysAgo, ... }\\n  // 全量客户分类格式：{ name, latestMessageContent, lastContactTime, latestMessageType, ... }\\n  if (!entry.latestMessageContent && entry.message) {\\n    entry.latestMessageContent = entry.message;\\n  }\\n  if (!entry.latestMessageType) {\\n    // 从message方向推断：有unreadCount/msgFromCustomer推断\\n    entry.latestMessageType = entry.isUnread ? 'received' : 'send';\\n  }\\n  if (!entry.lastContactTime && !entry.latestMessageTime) {\\n    // extract_cdp的timeStr是\\\"HH:MM\\\"或\\\"YYYY-M-D\\\"格式\\n    if (entry.timeStr) {\\n      if (entry.timeStr.includes(':')) {\\n        // 今天的时间 → 用当前时间\\n        entry.lastContactTime = Date.now();\\n      } else {\\n        entry.lastContactTime = new Date(entry.timeStr).getTime();\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n  // 如果extract_cdp已经计算了daysAgo，优先使用\\n  if (entry.daysAgo !== undefined && !entry._precomputedSilence) {\\n    entry._precomputedSilence = entry.daysAgo;\\n  }\\n  const flags = {};\\n  const issues = [];\\n\\n  const rawMsg = entry.latestMessageContent || '';\\n  const isSys = isSystemMessage(rawMsg);\\n\\n  // 1. 系统消息检测\\n  flags.isLatestSystemMsg = isSys;\\n  if (isSys) {\\n    issues.push('latestMessageContent 是系统消息');\\n    // 尝试从消息列表中找真实消息\\n    if (Array.isArray(entry.messages)) {\\n      const real = findLatestRealMessage(entry.messages);\\n      if (real) {\\n        entry._replacedMessageContent = real.text || real.latestMessageContent || '';\\n        entry._replacedFromIndex = entry.messages.indexOf(real);\\n        flags.latestMsgReplaced = true;\\n      }\\n    }\\n  }\\n\\n  // 2. 表情/单字检测\\n  const effectiveMsg = flags.latestMsgReplaced ? entry._replacedMessageContent : rawMsg;\\n  if (isEmojiOrSingleWord(effectiveMsg)) {\\n    flags.needLookback = true;\\n    issues.push('最后一条有效消息是表情/单字，需往前看');\\n  }\\n\\n  // 3. 消息数统计\\n  const msgCount = entry.messageCount || (Array.isArray(entry.messages) ? entry.messages.length : 0);\\n  entry._computedMessageCount = msgCount;\\n  if (msgCount >= 10) {\\n    flags.needFullRead = true;\\n    issues.push(`消息数 ${msgCount} ≥ 10，必须逐条读取`);\\n  }\\n\\n  // 4. 产品代码扫描\\n  const scanTargets = [effectiveMsg];\\n  if (Array.isArray(entry.messages)) {\\n    for (const m of entry.messages) {\\n      scanTargets.push(m.text || '');\\n    }\\n  }\\n  const allCodes = [];\\n  for (const t of scanTargets) {\\n    allCodes.push(...scanProductCodes(t));\\n  }\\n  const uniqueCodes = [...new Set(allCodes)];\\n  if (uniqueCodes.length > 0) {\\n    flags.hasProductSelection = true;\\n    entry._productCodes = uniqueCodes;\\n  }\\n\\n  // 5. 地址关键词扫描\\n  if (scanAddressKeywords(effectiveMsg) || (Array.isArray(entry.messages) && entry.messages.some((m) => scanAddressKeywords(m.text || '')))) {\\n    flags.hasAddress = true;\\n  }\\n\\n  // 6. 沉默天数\\n  const lastTime = entry.lastContactTime || entry.latestMessageTime;\\n  const silenceDays = calcSilenceDays(lastTime);\\n  entry._silenceDays = silenceDays;\\n\\n  // 7. 消息方向\\n  if (Array.isArray(entry.messages)) {\\n    const dir = calcMessageDirection(entry.messages);\\n    if (dir) {\\n      entry._messageDirection = dir;\\n    }\\n  } else if (entry.latestMessageType) {\\n    entry._messageDirection = {\\n      total: msgCount || 1,\\n      latestDirection: entry.latestMessageType,\\n    };\\n  }\\n\\n  // 8. 合并标记\\n  entry._flags = flags;\\n  entry._issues = issues;\\n\\n  return entry;\\n}\\n\\nfunction processAll(data) {\\n  const customers = getCustomersFromData(data);\\n  const cleaned = customers.map(processCustomer);\\n\\n  const stats = {\\n    total: cleaned.length,\\n    systemMsgDetected: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.isLatestSystemMsg).length,\\n    needLookback: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.needLookback).length,\\n    needFullRead: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.needFullRead).length,\\n    hasProductSelection: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.hasProductSelection).length,\\n    hasAddress: cleaned.filter((c) => c._flags.hasAddress).length,\\n    hasIssues: cleaned.filter((c) => c._issues.length > 0).length,\\n    silentOver90Days: cleaned.filter((c) => c._silenceDays > 90).length,\\n    silentOver30Days: cleaned.filter((c) => c._silenceDays > 30).length,\\n  };\\n\\n  return {\\n    processedAt: new Date().toISOString(),\\n    source: data.capturedAt || data.scrapedAt || 'unknown',\\n    stats,\\n    customers: cleaned,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n// ====== CLI入口 ======\\n\\nfunction findLatestInput() {\\n  const files = fs.readdirSync(DATA_DIR).filter((f) => f.endsWith('.json'));\\n  const candidates = [];\\n\\n  for (const f of files) {\\n    const fullPath = path.join(DATA_DIR, f);\\n    try {\\n      const stat = fs.statSync(fullPath);\\n      if (stat.size > 1000) {\\n        // 优先全量客户分类，其次 extracted\\n        if (f.includes('全量客户分类')) {\\n          candidates.push({ file: f, mtime: stat.mtimeMs, priority: 10 });\\n        } else if (f.startsWith('extracted_')) {\\n          candidates.push({ file: f, mtime: stat.mtimeMs, priority: 5 });\\n        }\\n      }\\n    } catch (_) { /* skip */ }\\n  }\\n\\n  candidates.sort((a, b) => b.priority - a.priority || b.mtime - a.mtime);\\n  return candidates[0]?.file || null;\\n}\\n\\nfunction main() {\\n  const inputArg = process.argv[2];\\n  let inputFile;\\n\\n  if (inputArg) {\\n    inputFile = path.resolve(inputArg);\\n  } else {\\n    const latest = findLatestInput();\\n    if (!latest) {\\n      console.error('未找到输入数据文件。请指定文件路径：node preprocess_cdp.js <data-file>');\\n      process.exit(1);\\n    }\\n    inputFile = path.join(DATA_DIR, latest);\\n  }\\n\\n  if (!fs.existsSync(inputFile)) {\\n    console.error(`文件不存在: ${inputFile}`);\\n    process.exit(1);\\n  }\\n\\n  console.log(`读取: ${path.basename(inputFile)}`);\\n  const raw = JSON.parse(fs.readFileSync(inputFile, 'utf-8'));\\n  const result = processAll(raw);\\n\\n  const ts = new Date().toISOString().replace(/[:.]/g, '-').slice(0, 19);\\n  const outFile = path.join(DATA_DIR, `cleaned_${ts}.json`);\\n  fs.writeFileSync(outFile, JSON.stringify(result, null, 2), 'utf-8');\\n\\n  console.log(`输出: ${path.basename(outFile)}`);\\n  console.log(`统计: ${result.stats.total} 个客户`);\\n  console.log(`  系统消息检测: ${result.stats.systemMsgDetected}`);\\n  console.log(`  需要往前看: ${result.stats.needLookback}`);\\n  console.log(`  需要完整阅读(≥10条): ${result.stats.needFullRead}`);\\n  console.log(`  有产品选择: ${result.stats.hasProductSelection}`);\\n  console.log(`  有地址信息: ${result.stats.hasAddress}`);\\n  console.log(`  有问题标记: ${result.stats.hasIssues}`);\\n  console.log(`  沉默超90天: ${result.stats.silentOver90Days}`);\\n  console.log(`  沉默超30天: ${result.stats.silentOver30Days}`);\\n\\n  if (result.stats.hasIssues > 0) {\\n    const issueList = result.customers.filter((c) => c._issues.length > 0);\\n    console.log(`\\\\n标记有问题的客户（前10）:`);\\n    for (const c of issueList.slice(0, 10)) {\\n      console.log(`  - ${c.name}: ${c._issues.join('; ')}`);\\n    }\\n  }\\n}\\n\\nmain();\\n\",\"structuredPatch\":[{\"oldStart\":222,\"oldLines\":10,\"newStart\":222,\"newLines\":13,\"lines\":[\"     flags.hasAddress = true;\",\"   }\",\" \",\"-  // 6. 沉默天数\",\"-  const message.content:
This session is being continued from a previous conversation that ran out of context. The summary below covers the earlier portion of the conversation.

Summary:
1. Primary Request and Intent:
   The user requested "继续 OKKI CRM 客户分析，跑阶段2" (Continue OKKI CRM customer analysis, run Phase 2). Phase 2 is defined as AI classification + evidence summary + confidence scoring for 432 OKKI CRM customers using a two-pass methodology: (1) metadata-based rough screening, (2) content-based correction by analyzing latestMessageContent. Output must include full P0-P4 ranking, evidence chains, two-pass diff report, ★☆☆ highlight list, and self-check checklist. After completion, pause for user review before proceeding to Phase 3.

2. Key Technical Concepts:
   - **5-Tier Priority Model**: P0 (payment/after-sales/high-intent), P1 (active negotiation/samples/quotes), P2 (valid inquiry/30-day interaction), P3 (silent/template response), P4 (30+ days no interaction/system-only)
   - **Two-Pass Classification**: First pass metadata (unreadCount, lastContactTime, message direction, silence days), second pass content signals (upgrade/downgrade triggers in latestMessageContent)
   - **Upgrade Triggers** (9 categories with weights 1-2): order signals, PI-related, payment-related, address given, quantity confirmed, samples stage, price/shipping discussion, product selection, partner consultation
   - **Downgrade Triggers** (3 categories): template questions, generic greetings only, emoji-only messages
   - **Confidence Stars**: ★★★ (confirmed, no review needed), ★★☆ (high probability, quick scan), ★☆☆ (uncertain, must confirm)
   - **CDP Data Limitation**: All data files lack full conversation messages — only latestMessageContent snapshots available, not complete message history
   - **Core Markets**: SD, EG, CD, ZM, CI, SA, AE + Middle East expansion (IQ, OM, BH, KW, QA, JO, LY, LB) + Africa expansion (GH, SN, KE, TZ, CM, ML, GN, ZW)
   - **CDP (Chrome DevTools Protocol)**: Chrome running on port 9222 for data extraction from Alibaba Onetalk
   - **Playwright**: Browser automation library used for CDP data extraction

3. Files and Code Sections:
   - **`d:\ClaudeWorkspace\08_客户跟进\Okki\scripts\classify_ai.js`** (Primary session wrote multiple times)
     - Phase 2 implementation script - the core deliverable for this phase
     - Complete Node.js script implementing deterministic AI classification using regex-based signal detection
     - Functions: `detectSignals(text)` - regex-based upgrade/downgrade detection; `classifyCustomer(c)` - main classification with cascading rules; `isPureSystemOrBot(c)` - system message detection
     - Classification rules in classifyCustomer():
       - Pure system/bot → P4/P3 based on silence
       - hasAddress + multi-upgrade(≥2) + ≤5d → P0
       - Strong upgrade (weight≥3) + ≤7d → P0
       - Medium upgrade + core market + ≤7d → P1
       - Unread + customer message → P0
       - hasAddress + ≤7d → P1
       - Core market + active + substantial content → P1
       - needLookback → P2 (low confidence)
       - Template question + silence → P3/P2
       - Silence >60d → P4, >30d → P3
       - Our message only + no response >7d → P3
     - Self-check items: empty messages, P0 with only our messages, P0/P1 with system messages, emoji misclassification, P0 over 5 days silent
     - Input: `data/classified_rules_2026-05-04T07-48-48.json` (hardcoded)
     - Output: `data/classified_ai_<timestamp>.json`

   - **`d:\ClaudeWorkspace\08_客户跟进\Okki\data\classified_rules_2026-05-04T07-48-48.json`** (Referenced, 625KB, 20703 lines)
     - Phase 1 output: 432 customers with _needAI, _rulePriority, _ruleReasons, _flags fields
     - Stats: P2:100, P4:311, P1:13, P0:4, P3:4; needAI:117, deterministic:315

   - **`d:\ClaudeWorkspace\08_客户跟进\Okki\scripts\extract_cdp.js`** (Read by primary session)
     - CDP data extraction from Alibaba Onetalk
     - 249 lines, uses Playwright chromium.connectOverCDP
     - Extracts contacts from DOM (contact-item-container), deduplicates, classifies by recency and unread status
     - Output: extracted_<timestamp>.json and p0p1_<timestamp>.json

   - **`d:\ClaudeWorkspace\08_客户跟进\Okki\scripts\classify_rules.js`** (Read by primary session)
     - Phase 1 rule engine, 302 lines
     - Deterministic rules: system msgs → P4, silence patterns → P3/P4, marks uncertain as needAI:true

   - **`d:\ClaudeWorkspace\08_客户跟进\Okki\scripts\preprocess_cdp.js`** (Read and run by primary session)
     - Phase 0 data preprocessing, 322 lines
     - Detects system messages, emoji/single-char messages, product codes, addresses, message direction
     - Output: cleaned_<timestamp>.json

   - **`d:\ClaudeWorkspace\08_客户跟进\Okki\data\extracted_2026-05-04T08-09-36-627Z.json`** (Created by primary session)
     - Fresh CDP extraction: 21 customers, 12 P0, 9 P1, 11 unread
     - Key customers visible: Abdulrhman alal, Christine Muwela, Asma Noor, amer ly (PI signal), Hakim Ezat, Aloh Voma (payment), Mumtaz Aziz, Diana Yao, Eddie Kilumba

   - **`d:\ClaudeWorkspace\08_客户跟进\Okki\STATE.md`** (Explored)
     - Project status tracker

4. Errors and fixes:
   - **Primary session repetitive loop**: The primary session is observed repeatedly writing classify_ai.js and rerunning the same CDP extraction and checks. This appears to be an automation loop issue, not a code bug.
   - **Preprocess output anomaly**: Running preprocess_cdp.js on the fresh extracted data (21 customers, all within 0-5 days) showed "沉默超90天: 21" and "沉默超30天: 21" — this is clearly wrong for fresh data with today's timestamps. The issue is likely in how the preprocessing script calculates silence days from the CDP data format.
   - **Data limitation**: All data files have `messages=0` — the CDP extraction did not capture full conversation history. Phase 2 limited to latestMessageContent analysis only.

5. Problem Solving:
   - **Solved**: Created classify_ai.js implementing the two-pass methodology with content signal detection via regex
   - **Identified**: 21 fresh CDP contacts extracted from live Alibaba Onetalk
   - **Identified**: Preprocessing issue where silence days calculation appears wrong for fresh data
   - **Pending**: Run classify_ai.js on the 432-customer classified_rules data and review output
   - **Pending**: User review of Phase 2 results before Phase 3

6. All user messages:
   - "继续 OKKI CRM 客户分析，跑阶段2" (Continue OKKI CRM customer analysis, run Phase 2) — with context that user opened settings.json in IDE

7. Pending Tasks:
   - Run `node scripts/classify_ai.js` to execute Phase 2 classification on the 432-customer classified_rules data
   - Review the diff report between Phase 1 rules and Phase 2 AI classification
   - Review ★☆☆ low confidence customers
   - Review self-check checklist results
   - Present results to user for approval before Phase 3
   - After approval: Phase 3 (P0+P1 deep analysis with backstory, profile, stage, bottleneck, action, script)
   - Update STATE.md after Phase 2 completion

8. Current Work:
   I was in plan mode, tasked with writing the implementation plan for Phase 2 execution. The primary session was actively writing classify_ai.js (repeatedly), running CDP extraction, and preprocessing data. The classify_ai.js script is complete and ready to run. The fresh CDP data (21 customers) was extracted and preprocessed, but the primary session appears stuck in a loop of repeated actions. I was about to write the plan file to `C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\plans\wiggly-launching-key.md` and call ExitPlanMode when this summary was requested.

9. Optional Next Step:
   Write the implementation plan to the plan file and call ExitPlanMode so the primary session can execute Phase 2. The plan should cover:
   1. Run `node scripts/classify_ai.js` on the existing classified_rules data (432 customers)
   2. Review console output: AI-classified distribution, diff report, ★☆☆ low-confidence list, self-check checklist
   3. Read the output JSON for key customers (P0/P1 with evidence chains)
   4. Present a concise summary to the user
   5. Update STATE.md
   6. Await user approval before Phase 3

   Direct quote from user's most recent explicit request: "继续 OKKI CRM 客户分析，跑阶段2"

If you need specific details from before compaction (like exact code snippets, error messages, or content you generated), read the full transcript at: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\projects\C--Users-Administrator--claude-mem-observer-sessions\eb918fbe-bceb-461b-a4fd-b78a831028b1.jsonl

skills.content:
Base directory for this skill: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\plugins\cache\thedotmack\claude-mem\12.5.1\skills\do

# Do Plan

You are an ORCHESTRATOR. Deploy subagents to execute *all* work. Do not do the work yourself except to coordinate, route context, and verify that each subagent completed its assigned checklist.

## Execution Protocol

### Rules

- Each phase uses fresh subagents where noted (or when context is large/unclear)
- Assign one clear objective per subagent and require evidence (commands run, outputs, files changed)
- Do not advance to the next step until the assigned subagent reports completion and the orchestrator confirms it matches the plan

### During Each Phase

Deploy an "Implementation" subagent to:
1. Execute the implementation as specified
2. COPY patterns from documentation, don't invent
3. Cite documentation sources in code comments when using unfamiliar APIs
4. If an API seems missing, STOP and verify — don't assume it exists

### After Each Phase

Deploy subagents for each post-phase responsibility:
1. **Run verification checklist** — Deploy a "Verification" subagent to prove the phase worked
2. **Anti-pattern check** — Deploy an "Anti-pattern" subagent to grep for known bad patterns from the plan
3. **Code quality review** — Deploy a "Code Quality" subagent to review changes
4. **Commit only if verified** — Deploy a "Commit" subagent *only after* verification passes; otherwise, do not commit

### Between Phases

Deploy a "Branch/Sync" subagent to:
- Push to working branch after each verified phase
- Prepare the next phase handoff so the next phase's subagents start fresh but have plan context

## Failure Modes to Prevent

- Don't invent APIs that "should" exist — verify against docs
- Don't add undocumented parameters — copy exact signatures
- Don't skip verification — deploy a verification subagent and run the checklist

skills.content:
Base directory for this skill: C:\Users\Administrator\.claude\plugins\cache\thedotmack\claude-mem\12.5.1\skills\smart-explore

# Smart Explore

Structural code exploration using AST parsing. **This skill overrides your default exploration behavior.** While this skill is active, use smart_search/smart_outline/smart_unfold as your primary tools instead of Read, Grep, and Glob.

**Core principle:** Index first, fetch on demand. Give yourself a map of the code before loading implementation details. The question before every file read should be: "do I need to see all of this, or can I get a structural overview first?" The answer is almost always: get the map.

## Your Next Tool Call

This skill only loads instructions. You must call the MCP tools yourself. Your next action should be one of:

```
smart_search(query="<topic>", path="./src")    -- discover files + symbols across a directory
smart_outline(file_path="<file>")              -- structural skeleton of one file
smart_unfold(file_path="<file>", symbol_name="<name>")  -- full source of one symbol
```

Do NOT run Grep, Glob, Read, or find to discover files first. `smart_search` walks directories, parses all code files, and returns ranked symbols in one call. It replaces the Glob → Grep → Read discovery cycle.

## 3-Layer Workflow

### Step 1: Search -- Discover Files and Symbols

```
smart_search(query="shutdown", path="./src", max_results=15)
```

**Returns:** Ranked symbols with signatures, line numbers, match reasons, plus folded file views (~2-6k tokens)

```
-- Matching Symbols --
  function performGracefulShutdown (services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts:56)
  function httpShutdown (services/infrastructure/HealthMonitor.ts:92)
  method WorkerService.shutdown (services/worker-service.ts:846)

-- Folded File Views --
  services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts (7 symbols)
  services/worker-service.ts (12 symbols)
```

This is your discovery tool. It finds relevant files AND shows their structure. No Glob/find pre-scan needed.

**Parameters:**

- `query` (string, required) -- What to search for (function name, concept, class name)
- `path` (string) -- Root directory to search (defaults to cwd)
- `max_results` (number) -- Max matching symbols, default 20, max 50
- `file_pattern` (string, optional) -- Filter to specific files/paths

### Step 2: Outline -- Get File Structure

```
smart_outline(file_path="services/worker-service.ts")
```

**Returns:** Complete structural skeleton -- all functions, classes, methods, properties, imports (~1-2k tokens per file)

**Skip this step** when Step 1's folded file views already provide enough structure. Most useful for files not covered by the search results.

**Parameters:**

- `file_path` (string, required) -- Path to the file

### Step 3: Unfold -- See Implementation

Review symbols from Steps 1-2. Pick the ones you need. Unfold only those:

```
smart_unfold(file_path="services/worker-service.ts", symbol_name="shutdown")
```

**Returns:** Full source code of the specified symbol including JSDoc, decorators, and complete implementation (~400-2,100 tokens depending on symbol size). AST node boundaries guarantee completeness regardless of symbol size — unlike Read + agent summarization, which may truncate long methods.

**Parameters:**

- `file_path` (string, required) -- Path to the file (as returned by search/outline)
- `symbol_name` (string, required) -- Name of the function/class/method to expand

## When to Use Standard Tools Instead

Use these only when smart_* tools are the wrong fit:

- **Grep:** Exact string/regex search ("find all TODO comments", "where is `ensureWorkerStarted` defined?")
- **Read:** Small files under ~100 lines, non-code files (JSON, markdown, config)
- **Glob:** File path patterns ("find all test files")
- **Explore agent:** When you need synthesized understanding across 6+ files, architecture narratives, or answers to open-ended questions like "how does this entire system work end-to-end?" Smart-explore is a scalpel — it answers "where is this?" and "show me that." It doesn't synthesize cross-file data flows, design decisions, or edge cases across an entire feature.

For code files over ~100 lines, prefer smart_outline + smart_unfold over Read.

## Workflow Examples

**Discover how a feature works (cross-cutting):**

```
1. smart_search(query="shutdown", path="./src")
   -> 14 symbols across 7 files, full picture in one call
2. smart_unfold(file_path="services/infrastructure/GracefulShutdown.ts", symbol_name="performGracefulShutdown")
   -> See the core implementation
```

**Navigate a large file:**

```
1. smart_outline(file_path="services/worker-service.ts")
   -> 1,466 tokens: 12 functions, WorkerService class with 24 members
2. smart_unfold(file_path="services/worker-service.ts", symbol_name="startSessionProcessor")
   -> 1,610 tokens: the specific method you need
Total: ~3,076 tokens vs ~12,000 to Read the full file
```

**Write documentation about code (hybrid workflow):**

```
1. smart_search(query="feature name", path="./src")    -- discover all relevant files and symbols
2. smart_outline on key files                           -- understand structure
3. smart_unfold on important functions                  -- get implementation details
4. Read on small config/markdown/plan files             -- get non-code context
```

Use smart_* tools for code exploration, Read for non-code files. Mix freely.

**Exploration then precision:**

```
1. smart_search(query="session", path="./src", max_results=10)
   -> 10 ranked symbols: SessionMetadata, SessionQueueProcessor, SessionSummary...
2. Pick the relevant one, unfold it
```

## Token Economics

| Approach | Tokens | Use Case |
|----------|--------|----------|
| smart_outline | ~1,000-2,000 | "What's in this file?" |
| smart_unfold | ~400-2,100 | "Show me this function" |
| smart_search | ~2,000-6,000 | "Find all X across the codebase" |
| search + unfold | ~3,000-8,000 | End-to-end: find and read (the primary workflow) |
| Read (full file) | ~12,000+ | When you truly need everything |
| Explore agent | ~39,000-59,000 | Cross-file synthesis with narrative |

**4-8x savings** on file understanding (outline + unfold vs Read). **11-18x savings** on codebase exploration vs Explore agent. The narrower the query, the wider the gap — a 27-line function costs 55x less to read via unfold than via an Explore agent, because the agent still reads the entire file.

## Language Support

Smart-explore uses **tree-sitter AST parsing** for structural analysis. Unsupported file types fall back to text-based search.

### Bundled Languages

| Language | Extensions |
|----------|-----------|
| JavaScript | `.js`, `.mjs`, `.cjs` |
| TypeScript | `.ts` |
| TSX / JSX | `.tsx`, `.jsx` |
| Python | `.py`, `.pyw` |
| Go | `.go` |
| Rust | `.rs` |
| Ruby | `.rb` |
| Java | `.java` |
| C | `.c`, `.h` |
| C++ | `.cpp`, `.cc`, `.cxx`, `.hpp`, `.hh` |

Files with unrecognized extensions are parsed as plain text — `smart_search` still works (grep-style), but `smart_outline` and `smart_unfold` will not extract structured symbols.

### Custom Grammars (`.claude-mem.json`)

You can register additional tree-sitter grammars for file types not in the bundled list. Create or update `.claude-mem.json` in your project root:

```json
{
  "grammars": {
    ".sol": "tree-sitter-solidity",
    ".graphql": "tree-sitter-graphql"
  }
}
```

Each key is a file extension; each value is the npm package name of the tree-sitter grammar. The grammar must be installed locally (`npm install tree-sitter-solidity`). Once registered, `smart_outline` and `smart_unfold` will parse those extensions structurally instead of falling back to plain text.

### Markdown Special Support

Markdown files (`.md`, `.mdx`) receive special handling beyond the generic plain-text fallback:

- **`smart_outline`** — extracts headings (`#`, `##`, `###`) as the symbol tree. Use it to navigate long documents without reading the full file.
- **`smart_search`** — searches within code fences as well as prose, so queries for function names inside ` ```ts ``` ` blocks work as expected.
- **`smart_unfold`** — expands heading sections rather than function bodies; each section up to the next same-level heading is returned as a chunk.
- **Frontmatter** — YAML frontmatter (lines between leading `---` delimiters) is included in `smart_outline` output under a synthetic `frontmatter` symbol so metadata like `title:` and `description:` is visible without reading the whole file.
